Name: WochiTV Window Tint for Home , One Way Privacy Window Film Heat Control Non Adhesive, UV Blocking Heat Control Static Cling, Reflective Glass Film Mirror Tint (Silver 23.6 in x 6.56 Ft) Description: List of features: HEAT CONTROL & UV BLOCKING: WochiTV reflective window film blocks out 90% of infrared rays. Retain heat in winter and keep cool in summer, which helps to reduce expensive heating and cooling costs. 10% of VLT meaning effectively reduce glare light and effectively blocks out 96% of UV rays. Protecting your skin from damage and reduce the fading & aging of interior furnishings. DAYTIME PRIVACY PROTECTION: Our one way privacy window film can provide great privacy during daytime. People can't see inside the house, because outside glass will show mirror effect during daytime. However, people will be able to see inside if lights are on and they are looking from the outside at night, so please draw a curtain to protect privacy during night if needed. EASY TO INSTALL & REMOVED: WochiTV non adhesive window film comes with glue free design, no chemical release, no glue or heat gun needed. Simply use water or soapy water to install on flat, clean, and smooth glass surfaces. Removable and reusable. When removed, this non adhesive window film leave no sticky residue. Note: installed inside of the window. WIDELY APPLICATION & DIY: Our Static cling window film can be used in the Balcony, Door, Living Room, Kitchen, Bedroom, Office, hotel, etc. Note: make sure the surface is flat and tear off the protective film ( transparent film) before installation. EXCELLENT AFTER-SALES SERVICE: 90 days return policy against any product defects. You can buy with confidence. Be free to contact us if you encounter any problems. Details: BRIEF
Perfectly protect your privacy with WochiTV Window Film.
Simple home window film decorates your place, static cling to the surface without glue for extra safety and convenience.
Easy to remove and re-apply for multiple times.
The window film leaves no residue, waterproof and oil proof.


ADVANTAGES
Privacy Protection Level: It can provide you DAYTIME indoor privacy protection.
UV Protection: Blocks 97% of UV rays, protects skin from damage, and reduces furniture fading and aging.
Energy Saving: Heat insulation in summer, reduce costs, energy saving and environmental protection.
No Adhesive: The glass film is adhesive-free and user friendly to avoid release of chemicals.


INSTALLATION INSTRUCTIONS

Step 1. Keep Window or Glass clean.

Step 2. Wet the Window or Glass with water (Soapy water will be better).

Step 3. Remove the Static Film from backing protect sheet (Please make sure you have removed it before you apply).

Step 4. When you install it, apply to wet glass and smooth with hands.

Step 5. Squeegee away air bubbles and redundant water.

Step 6. Two people work together more efficiently.

Step 7. Enjoy your works! If you want to remove it, simply peel the window film from any corner. It comes off cleanly leaving no residue.

Package Included: 1 Roll High-Quality Window Film.


More Surprise
✅Perfect DIY Tools -
It is a perfect decoration, you can DIY design any smooth glass surface in your home according to your own taste. Enjoy your high quality of life.

✅Reusable & No Residue-
Removable glass film leaves no residue on the glass. You can re-position & reuse it after years, suitable for all occasions!

✅Enjoy Comfortable Light-
This window privacy covering can diffuse direct sunlight to prevent glares, so that you can sleep and work under dark light.

Name: HooTown Window Tint for Home One Way Window Film Daytime Privacy Mirror Film Static Non-Adhesive Window Tint Film Heat Control Anti UV One Way Privacy Window Film for Home (Silver, 17.7 in x 6.5 ft)
Description:
List of features:
🍁HEAT CONTROL & ENERGY SAVING🍁: This window film for home can effectively block most of the sunlight and reduce the heat in the hot summer. Keep your room cool, help save money by cutting high energy bills, let you and your family to enjoy a more comfortable and cool summer life. Not recommended use on double pane windows.
🍁EFFECTIVE UV BLOCKING🍁: One way window film blocks out 97% UV, 85% IR and 15% VLT, effectively block UV rays can prevent sunburn, anti-aging and freckles, which is great for people with sensitive skin. The window tint also reduce glare and prevent the fading and aging of indoor furniture.
🍁STATIC CLING & NON ADHESIVES🍁: This privacy window film is free of glue design, no chemical release, very easy to install. Make sure the glass surface is completely clean and smooth, tear off the transparent backing, wet the window glass and film with a lot of soapy water, you can easily paste the window films on your window, and no worry about damage or residue is left when you remove.

When the inside light is stronger than outside, the mirror effect will be reversed, outside people can see inside, inside window glass shows mirror effect. Do remember to draw curtain during night.
🍁12 MONTHS AFTER-SALES SERVICE🍁: The window privacy film perfect for living room, bedroom, attics and office's window. Suitable for year-round coverage. If there is any problem with the window film, or you have any questions about the installation process. Please feel free to contact us, we will solve any problems for you within 12 hours.

Name: Amposei One Way Mirror Window Film, Window Privacy Film Heat Control Anti UV Static Cling Tint Solar Film Reflective Non-Adhesive for Glass Door Home Office Daytime Sun Blocking Silver 17.7x78.7inches Description: List of features: 📹SOLAR WINDOW FILM - The window privacy film has good heat control effect. It can block out 85% of UV Rays and 90% of Infrared Rays. 15% visible light transmittance makes it reduce glare effectively on daytime, keeping you cool in the summer and warm in the winter to save heat/cool expenses. 📹HIGH QUALITY & NON ADHESIVES - Our removable solar window film is made of premium PVC, thickness of 0.15mm, no fading, clear and bright, economical and practical. 📹DAYTIME PRIVACY PROTECTION - One way mirror window film offers great privacy protection during the day. When interior turns on light at night, The mirror-effect will be reversed since the interior is exposed to more light than the exterior. It means that the inside could be seen through outside at night, you can pull down the curtain. 📹STATIC CLING & EASY TO APPLY - Glue free design, Non-toxic, no smell and easy to install. Just Clean the window surface completely and spray a lot of soapy water to both the adhesive side and window. If you don’t want it, it can be also easy to remove, very convenient! 📹EFFECTIVE UV BLOCKING - Our UV blocking window film can reduce fading and aging of interior furnishings. For beauties, our window film can prevent our skin from sunburning, anti-aging and freckles. Perfect decor for home, office, library, gym, coffee shop and etc. use. Details: UV Blocking Window Privacy Film
A privacy window makes you enjoy the sun during the day without affecting your indoor privacy.
When interior turns on light at night, The mirror-effect will be reversed since the interior is exposed to more light than the exterior. It means that the inside could be seen through outside at night, you can pull down the curtain.
The sun's ultraviolet rays are responsible for both tanning and burning.It's the culprit of freckles.
This window film can also effectively suppress ultraviolet rays with the additional UV solvent layer.
Since its great heat control effect, our window film can Keep your room in a relevant comfort temperature which has a great meaning in energy saving and environment protection.

Installation Instructions:
Step 1: Measuring the size of the window.
Step 2: Measuring the size of the solar film and cut it.
Step 3: Remove the static film from backing protect sheet.
Step 4: Keep window or glass clean and Spray the window or glass with water (Soapy water will be the best choice).
Step 5: When you install it, apply to wet glass and smooth with hand.
Step 6: Spray the window or glass with water again.
Step 7: Attaching the protect sheet to the window film.
Step 8: Squeegee away air bubbles and redundant water.
Step 9: After Scraping, Remove the protect sheet.
Step 10: Cut the excess edges.
Step 11: Dry the window film with a cloth.
Step 12: Finished.

Useful Tips:
❗1. When cutting the window film, note that the size of the cut is 1-2 cm larger than the actual one-sided size of the window.
❗2. Before pasting, remember to tear off the protective film and spray a lot of water.
❗3. Attaching the protect sheet first, then use the squeegee to scrape the bubbles to prevent the squeegee from scratching the surface of the film.

Package Including
1 x Window Privacy Film

Name: Window Film One Way Mirror Film Daytime Privacy Static Non-Adhesive Decorative Heat Control Anti UV Window Tint for Home and Office Silver 6 Mil 17.7 Inch x 6.5 Feet Description: List of features: HEAT INSULATION,ENERGY SAVING and BASIC PARAMETERS - One way window film blocks out 90% of infrared rays and 85% of UV rays reducing fading and aging of interior furnishings. The heat control window film can retain heat in winter and keep it out in summer, reducing expensive heating and cooling costs. 15% of VLT helps effectively reduce glare. STATIC CLING AND NON ADHESIVES – This self adhesive window privacy film is free of glue design, no chemical release, very easy to install, just make sure window surface is completely clean and absolutely free of any blemishes. Remember to use A LOT of soap/water mixture to soak both the adhesive side and window. THICKNESS AND HIGH QUALITY - Glass film the thickness of 6 mil window film has excellent thermal insulation effect, with anti-scratch layer on the surface, friction resisting, won’t fade nor blister, easy to remove, economical and practical. PRIVACY PROTECTION – Attention about window film privacy, there's different privacy effect between daytime and night. The one-way window film provides great privacy during daytime only and outside glass shows mirror effect. As the outside light becomes weaker, the mirror effect of outside glass will disappear gradually and outside people can see inside . When the inside light is stronger than outside, the mirror effect will be reversed. Remember to draw curtain during night. AFTER-SALES SERVICE-30 days return policy guarantee against any product defects guarantee. Any question, feel free to contact us. You will have a perfect shopping experience. Now Click "Add to Cart", ready for decorating your home. Details:

Feature:

Windows bring sunlight in but also cause cooling cost.WPCTEV Window glass privacy film can reduce energy loss and lower cooling costs by up to 30 percent.

  • No glue:This removable solar window film is made from earth friendly PVC,thickness of 0.15mm,clear and bright,no need glue when applying.
  • Easy to use:Static cling film, applicable to any smooth or flat glass surface,like window,sliding door,balcony,protecting the glass from damage.
  • Multi-function:A suitable house window tint,worked as privacy curtain in daytime,Also it can block annoying glare and reject UV to reduce fading; protect interior furnishings.widely used in dining room,residential,bedroom,office and etc.

Remarks:

1.Window film the privacy effect will be different as the light and angle changes.

2.Single plane fluoroscopy:One-way perspective refers to the strong light intensity side can't see the dark side of the light, which means when indoor light is stronger than outdoor, people outside can see people inside.In general,people outside can't see people inside during daytime.

3.Different effect between daytime and night:The outside glass will show a mirror effect as well as keep your privacy during daytime, when evening indoor light is stronger,then the glass outside will lose mirror effect as well as outside people can see inside.

4.Mirror effect:The mirror effect we said means it has a slightly reflective effect,not totally like a mirror.

5.Peel off the backing transparent protective film, paste the film to the window and use your hand to press it from the top down so that it can tightly attach to the surface, put protective film on window film before squeegee away water and air bubbles,prevent damaging window film.

Package:Window film x 1

Name: HIDBEA One Way Window Film Non-Adhesive, Daytime Privacy Reflective Mirror Window Tint for Home, Heat Control UV Blocking Glass Films Self Static Cling Window Stickers (Silver, 35.4 Inch x 8.2 Feet) Description: List of features: ADVANCED UV BLOCKING PROTECTION – This anti-glare window film is designed to block out harmful UV rays which can impact eye and skin health, heat insulation, and energy savings for intense summers and year-round coverage. STATIC CLING APPLICATION – This advanced window tint film uses static cling to easily attach to your window and doesn’t use adhesives for a faster, bubble-free placement. It can also be removed with no sticky residue! DAYTIME PRIVACY PROTECTION – Applying our mirror window film to your windows keeps prying eyes from looking in during daytime while letting natural lights in, and outside glass shows mirror reflective effect. NOTICE: When the inside light is stronger than outside at night, the film CAN NOT provide privacy, and the mirror reflective effect will disappear. Do remember to draw curtain during night. MULTIPURPOSE HOME OR OFFICE USE– HIDBEA one way privacy window film can be used in living rooms, waiting areas, bedrooms, attics, enclosed porches, and anywhere windows where you want to block UV light or intense heat. (Not applicable to double pane glass) TRUSTED AFTER-SALES SERVICE – We want to provide you with the very best window glass films possible, as well as with customer service you can rely on. We’ll always be here to answer questions and provide fast support. Details:
Is there uncomfortable light outside?
Would you like a reliable private space?
Is the sunshine too dazzling?
Do you have the above problems?

If so, HIDBEA mirror reflective film is good at blocking lights from outside to protect privacy inside, creating a
comfortable and reliable privacy room, reducing the intensity of sunlight to make the sunshine soft, also allowing
the light in so that indoor will not be dark.


Specification

►Material: vinyl, no glue
►Thickness: 6Mil
►IR rejection: 85%~90%
►UV rejection: 85%~97%
►VLT: 10%~15%


Installation Instructions:

Step 1. Keep window or glass clean
Step 2. Wet the window or glass with water (Soapy water will be the best choice)
Step 3. Remove the static film from backing protect sheet (Please make sure you have removed it before
you apply the window film to glass)
Step 4. When you install it, apply to wet glass and smooth with hands
Step 5. Squeegee away air bubbles and redundant water
Step 6. If you want to remove it, simply peel the window film from any corner. It comes off cleanly without residue


Useful Tips:

☆Before pasting, remember to tear off the protective film and spray a lot of water.
☆Use a watering can to spray more water on the glass and surface of the film, the more water, the better, and
scrape all the bubbles out with a squeegee.
☆Cut the film to a size of 2mm from the window frame, pick up a corner at the edge, re-spray and paste,
and scrape the bubble.


Package Included:

1 x HIDBEA privacy glass film
1 x User manual

Name: Welspo 3 in-1 Kids Tricycles, Easy Steer Toddler Tricycle for 1-5 Years Old Kids Trike with Safety Seat, Storage Basket, Foot Pedals (Black&White) Description: List of features: 💗 Perfect Gifts for Kids - WELSPO trikes for toddler adopts a strong carbon steel frame structure, made of durable metal/plastic structure strong load-bearing capacity which is ideal for any child. 💗 3-in-1 Kids Tricycles Design - can be assembled in 3 ways: push Trike, learn-to-ride tricycle and Independent Trikecycle, going from a push tricycle for infants to a full toddler tricycle, designed to help your baby develop motor skills and ride independently. 💗 Increased Safety - This kids' tricycle with featuring a safety bar, easy to assemble, an adjustable 2-point harness provides maximum protection for the baby while riding, brings the fun of going out for the baby. 💗 Removable push/steer handle - Helps parent adjust the handlebars to the appropriate height to control steering and speed while walking comfortably. 💗 Front and Rear Large Storage Basket - The storage basket provides ample storage space for baby's toys, snacks. Quiet design, foldable pedals, high-quality wheels, wear-resistant and shock-absorbing, adapt to various grounds. This removable steering system will allow the rider to pedal and steer the tricycle or the parent can take control and steer with the push/steer handle, can provide maximum security when going out.

Noted: If you do not know how to install, please feel free to contact us to get the installation video.

**M.A.D. for Everything's 3-in-1 Toddler Bike: A Versatile Ride for Growing Children**

M.A.D. for Everything introduces a dynamic 3-in-1 toddler bike designed to adapt to a child's developmental stages, from ages 1 to 5. This innovative bicycle offers multiple configurations, allowing it to transform from a tricycle pushbike for toddlers as young as one, into a pedal tricycle, a two-wheel balance bike, or a standard pedal bicycle. This adaptability eliminates the need for multiple purchases, providing a single, long-lasting solution.

Constructed with a robust steel frame and aluminum alloy, the bike prioritizes durability and a lightweight design, weighing just 7.7 lbs (3.5kg). It features EVA soft non-slip wheels, comfortable handle grips, and a non-slip saddle, ensuring a secure and enjoyable riding experience. The adjustable seat height further enhances its suitability for growing children.

Designed for ultimate convenience, the M.A.D. for Everything 3-in-1 bike boasts a smart one-button folding mechanism, reducing it to a compact 14" x 16" x 9.8" (36cm x 41cm x 25cm) for effortless storage and portability. This makes it ideal for travel, fitting easily into cars, planes, or trains. The pedals can be conveniently stored under the saddle when not in use, preventing interference during balance bike mode.

Assembly is entirely eliminated; the bike unfolds and the seat slots into place, ready for immediate use. Available in three appealing colors, it promises to engage children while fostering essential skills such as balance, coordination, physical ability, and cognitive development. **KORIMEFA 3-in-1 Kids Tricycle: Fostering Early Development and Fun for Toddlers**

The KORIMEFA 3-in-1 Kids Tricycle, available in a vibrant green, is ingeniously designed to grow with your child, offering a versatile and engaging experience from infancy through toddlerhood. This innovative ride-on toy seamlessly transitions between three distinct modes: a classic tricycle, a balance bike, and a pedal-less mode, catering to a wide age range from 10 months to 3 years old.

**A Multifaceted Design for Progressive Learning**

The tricycle's adaptability is a key feature, allowing parents to easily convert it into a two-wheeled balance bike by simply folding the rear wheels. Furthermore, the pedals are detachable, enabling a smooth transition to a pedal-less mode. This no-pedal configuration is crucial for developing fundamental biking skills such as balance, directional control, and coordination. As children gain confidence and master these basics, they can then reintroduce the pedals to learn essential driving techniques. "The pedal-less mode is a fantastic way for young children to build confidence and understand the mechanics of riding before they even touch the pedals," notes child development specialist Dr. Emily Carter. "It truly empowers them to learn at their own pace."

**Built for Safety and Durability**

KORIMEFA prioritizes safety and longevity in its design. The tricycle boasts a non-slip handlebar for a secure grip, a comfortable PU leather seat ergonomically designed for optimal support, and durable EVA wheels that provide a smooth ride. The robust steel frame and stable triangular structure ensure enhanced convenience and unwavering safety. The seat cushion itself is engineered with human-centric principles to provide maximum comfort and prevent slippage. "We've rigorously tested our materials and design to ensure the highest safety standards," states a KORIMEFA representative. "Parents can have complete peace of mind knowing their child is on a secure and well-built product."

**Adjustability for a Growing Child**

Recognizing that children grow rapidly, the KORIMEFA tricycle features an adjustable handlebar angle, allowing parents to set the optimal driving position. The handlebar offers a 60-degree steering range, effectively preventing accidental falls to the side. The adjustable seat height is specifically tailored for children aged 1 to 3 years, ensuring a perfect fit as they grow. This thoughtful adjustability means the tricycle can remain a cherished companion for your child throughout their early developmental years.

**Enhancing Early Childhood Development**

This versatile ride-on toy plays a significant role in a child's early development. By interacting with the bike, toddlers quickly grasp the concept of movement and propulsion, fostering an immediate sense of accomplishment. The physical act of balancing, directing, and propelling the tricycle strengthens crucial muscle groups, including those used for leaning, steering, moving, walking, and eventually, riding. "The KORIMEFA tricycle is more than just a toy; it's a tool for building physical literacy and self-esteem," comments early childhood educator Mark Jenkins. "The progression from tricycle to balance bike allows for a natural and intuitive learning curve."

**Uncompromising Safety Features**

Safety is paramount, and the KORIMEFA tricycle is designed with fully enclosed wheels to prevent any risk of little feet getting caught. The product has successfully undergone all required safety testing, confirming that all materials and design elements are safe for children. This commitment to safety allows parents to confidently choose the KORIMEFA 3-in-1 Kids Tricycle for their child's active adventures.

Name: Costzon Baby Play Yard - 18-Panel Foldable Rocket Playpen

Description:
The Costzon Baby Play Yard, in its engaging "Primary Rocket" design, offers a secure and spacious environment for infants and toddlers. This 18-panel foldable playpen is constructed from premium, non-toxic HDPE material, ensuring it's safe for your child's health. The frosted surface design prevents accidental scratches, and the robust 1.5-inch panel thickness provides exceptional stability.

Designed for convenience, the Costzon playpen features a foldable structure that allows for quick setup and easy storage in any corner of your home, saving valuable space. Each panel is equipped with a handle, facilitating effortless movement and adjustment of the playpen's configuration.

Safety is paramount with this play yard. It includes non-slip bases on each panel, significantly enhancing stability and preventing tipping or sliding. An external safety lock on the door ensures your child remains securely inside, providing peace of mind while you attend to other tasks.

The integrated game panel is both entertaining and educational. It features a sound button and a push lever designed to capture a baby's attention and promote hand-eye coordination through its swivel design. With a height of 23 inches, the playpen is ideal for children aged 6 to 36 months, offering a safe space for them to practice standing and walking without the risk of climbing out.

This 18-panel configuration can be assembled into various shapes, such as squares, rectangles, hexagons, or circles, providing ample room for your baby to crawl, walk, and explore. The generous coverage allows for parents to join their child inside for playtime or rest.

**Specifications:**

*   **Material:** High-Density Polyethylene (HDPE)
*   **Product Dimensions:** 61.5'' L x 61.5'' W x 23'' H

*   **Folded Dimensions:** 23.5" L x 17" W x 23" H

The YOBEST Baby Playpen, an extra-large indoor and outdoor activity center, is designed to provide a secure and spacious environment for children. This play yard features an anti-slip base and a sturdy construction, ensuring safety for little ones. The playpen is crafted with super-soft, breathable mesh, offering a comfortable and well-ventilated fence play area for babies and toddlers.

**Liberate Parental Hands:**
The YOBEST portable playpen offers a solution for parents needing to multitask. It transforms any area into a safe play space, allowing mothers to attend to other tasks while their children play securely. "This playpen is a lifesaver," says one parent. "It gives me peace of mind knowing my baby is safe while I get things done." It's important to note that ocean balls are not included with this product.

**Generous Play Area:**
With external dimensions of 75x59x27 inches (190x150x70cm) and internal dimensions of 72x56x27 inches (184x141x70cm), the YOBEST extra-large playpen provides ample room. It can comfortably accommodate approximately three babies and three adults, allowing for crawling, standing, playing, and napping. The thoughtful wall design keeps children within a safe play range, freeing parents from constant, hawk-like supervision. This allows for activities like relaxing, watching television, or talking on the phone.

**Safety and Durability:**
Constructed from durable, encryption 300D Oxford cloth and strong fabric mesh sidings, this playpen is more robust than many competitors that use only 210D Oxford cloth. The material is BPA-free, easy to clean, soft, and odorless. It can be maintained with simple hand washing and wiping with a damp cloth and soap. For enhanced stability, the playpen features four TPR suction cup bases, ensuring it remains upright even when a 150-pound adult leans on it.

**Visibility and Secure Design:**
The four walls of the playpen are made of breathable, visible mesh, allowing children to see their parents from multiple angles, promoting a sense of security. The sturdy structure includes a secure external zipper and a protective cotton cover to prevent babies from crawling out or bumping themselves, ensuring comprehensive safety. YOBEST also includes four pull rings to assist babies in standing and learning to walk.

**Effortless Assembly and Support:**
Certified with CPC authentication, the YOBEST playpen ensures worry-free use. It is constructed with premium alloy steel pipes and plastic joint connections, making it easy to assemble and disassemble without tools. The tension created when assembled keeps the playpen tight and sturdy. YOBEST provides 24-hour customer service and a one-year warranty for added support.

**Important Safety Warnings:**
*   Failure to follow these warnings and instructions could result in serious injury or death.
*   Ensure the product, including side rails, is fully erected before use.
*   The top support member must be installed prior to use to prevent a child from falling out.
*   Strings can cause strangulation; never place items with strings around a child's neck or attach strings to toys.
*   Discontinue use when a child can climb out or reaches 35 inches (890 mm) in height.
*   Improvised netting or covers can lead to entrapment and death; never add such items.
*   Remove bumper pads, large toys, and other objects that could serve as steps when a child can pull to a standing position.
*   Never place the product near windows where blind or drape cords can strangle a child.
*   Always provide necessary supervision; never leave a child unattended when used for playing.
*   Do not use if there are loose or missing fasteners, loose joints, broken parts, or torn mesh/fabric. Contact the manufacturer for replacement parts and never substitute them.

**Dripex Upgrade Foldable Kids Activity Centre: The Safe and Stylish Play Solution**

Introducing the **Dripex Upgrade Foldable Kids Activity Centre**, a thoughtfully designed playpen that prioritizes both safety and aesthetics for your little ones. This **New 2021 Version** boasts major upgrades, including a unique neutral color palette of grey and white, perfectly suited for both baby boys and girls without the visual disruption of overly bright, multi-colored panels. This intentional design choice ensures the playpen seamlessly integrates into your home decor while providing a calming environment for your baby's developing eyes.

**Uncompromising Safety and Stability**

The Dripex playpen is constructed from **high-density polyethylene plastic**, a material rigorously tested to ensure it will not harm your baby's health. This commitment to safety is further reinforced by its **non-slip rubber pads** on the bottom of each panel, making it exceptionally difficult to tip over or move. For an added layer of security, the package includes **extra suction cups** that can be attached as needed, providing enhanced stability on any surface. NOTE

Please kindly note that the power station cannot be charged and used at the same time.

When not using AC output, please turn off the switch to protect the power station from power consumption.

In order to protect the battery life, please complete the charge within one week after the battery is exhausted.

To reduce risk of damage to the electric plug and cord, pull the plug rather than the cord when disconnecting the power pack.

Do not operate the power pack with a damaged cord or plug, or a damaged output cable.

Be extra cautious to reduce risk of dropping a metal tool onto battery. It might spark or short-circuit battery or other electrical parts that may cause explosion.

Remove personal metal items such as rings, bracelets, necklaces, and watches when working with a Li-ion battery. A Li-ion battery can produce a short-circuit current high enough to weld a ring or the like to metal, causing a severe burn.

When charging the internal battery, work in a well ventilated area and do not restrict ventilation in any way.

Do not expose a power pack to fire or excessive temperature. Exposure to fire or temperature above 130°C may cause explosion. The temperature of 130°C can be replaced by the temperature of 265°F.

Description:

Safe and user-friendly | We prioritize product safety, backed with multiple layers of protections. Sherpa 100AC comes with a 1-year warranty. All elements of the product from physical construction to user interface are designed for ease of use. Interactive display lets you check power in and power out, get detailed port information, and set roles for ports. We’re including the cables you need to get the job done and an easy way to store them. Includes Apple, Micro USB, USB-C and USB-C to USB-C

Details: Goal Zero Sherpa 100AC portable power bank is sleek and powerful. The Sherpa 100AC is your go-to source for versatile power while on the move. Weighs only 2 lbs in a compact (7.5 x 1.0 x 5.68 in) and well designed pack. This 100 Watt-hour power pack supports Type-C (PD), 100W AC, Qi Wireless Charging, 2.4A USB, Interactive OLED display and four charging cords that store neatly within the power pack.

**SinKeu HP-100: Your Compact and Reliable Portable Power Solution**

The SinKeu HP-100 146Wh (42000mAh) portable power station offers a versatile and quiet energy solution for a variety of needs, from outdoor adventures to home emergencies. This rechargeable generator provides a stable power source for your essential devices, ensuring you stay connected and powered up wherever you are.

**Key Features and Benefits:**

*   **Versatile Power Output:** Equipped with dual 110V AC outlets, two DC ports, and two Quick Charge 3.0 (QC 3.0) USB ports, the HP-100 can simultaneously power and charge a wide range of devices. This includes laptops, smartphones, tablets, cameras, and other small electronics. The AC outlets are rated for 100W continuous output and a 200W peak output, making it suitable for small appliances.

*   **Efficient Charging:** The QC 3.0 USB ports enable rapid charging for compatible devices, significantly reducing downtime. An integrated LCD display provides clear, real-time information on the power station's status, including remaining battery life.

*   **Flexible Recharging Options:** The HP-100 can be recharged via a standard AC wall outlet or a car charger. For added convenience and sustainability, it also supports solar charging with compatible solar panels (sold separately). The built-in MPPT (Maximum Power Point Tracking) technology optimizes solar energy capture, while Smart Energy Control ensures efficient charging and power conservation.

*   **Robust Safety Features:** A comprehensive Battery Management System (BMS) protects against over-temperature, over-voltage, over-power, over-current, and short circuits, safeguarding both the power station and your connected devices. SinKeu backs this reliability with a 12-month warranty.

*   **User-Friendly Operation:** To activate the AC outlets, simply press the Power Button and then press and hold the AC button for two seconds. It's important to note that the HP-100 is designed for devices drawing under 100W. While it can briefly power some devices like mini-refrigerators or CPAP machines, it is not recommended for sustained use due to potential power draw exceeding the unit's capacity.

**Product Specifications:**

*   **AC Outlets:** 2 x 110V, 100W (Max Continuous), 200W (Peak)
*   **DC Output Port:** 1 x 12V/10A
*   **DC Input Port:** 1 x 15V/2A
*   **QC 3.0 USB Ports:** 2 x 5V/3A, 9V/2A (18W Max each)
*   **Battery Capacity:** 42000mAh / 146Wh
*   **Dimensions:** 7.3 x 4.3 x 6.5 inches
*   **Weight:** Approximately 2.9 lbs
*   **Recharging Time:** 6-7 hours (via 15V DC)
*   **Cycle Life:** >1000 times
*   **Working Temperature:** -20°C to 60°C

**Package Includes:**

*   1 x HP-100 Portable Solar Generator
*   1 x AC Adapter
*   1 x DC Cigarette Lighter Adapter
*   1 x User Manual

**SUHU Car Battery Charger: Intelligent 12V/8A and 24V/4A Smart Automatic Charging and Maintenance**

The SUHU Car Battery Charger is an intelligent, automatic solution designed to efficiently charge and maintain a wide range of 12V and 24V lead-acid batteries. This versatile charger is compatible with batteries ranging from 6-150Ah for 12V systems and 6-100Ah for 24V systems. It supports various battery types, including AGM, GEL, SLA, Flooded (WET), and common automotive, deep-cycle, marine, or maintenance-free batteries. Please note that this charger is not suitable for lithium batteries. Its broad compatibility extends to numerous vehicles, such as electric vehicles, agricultural vehicles, off-road vehicles, pickup trucks, boats, yachts, motorboats, and SUVs.

**Key Features and Benefits:**

*   **Wide Application:** The SUHU charger is engineered for versatility, catering to a comprehensive array of lead-acid battery types and vehicle applications.

*   **Effective Reparation Mode:** This charger features an automatic sulfa-ting and acid stratification detection system. With a single button press, it can activate the battery and employ a pulse repair function to help revive loss batteries and extend their lifespan. However, it's important to understand that this mode cannot activate a completely dead battery or repair a seriously damaged one, nor can it restore a battery to 100% of its original capacity.

*   **Automatic Charging:** The charger intelligently detects whether a 12V or 24V battery is connected. A sophisticated microprocessor-controlled program continuously monitors the entire charging process. It automatically adjusts the charging current to effectively manage various voltage environments, ensuring an adaptive and safe charging experience. The SUHU charger automatically stops when the battery is fully charged, providing maximum safety.

*   **Safety Charging:** Constructed with an ABS flame-retardant shell, this charger is fireproof, resistant to electric shock, and corrosion-resistant, ensuring durability. It incorporates built-in circuit protection against reverse polarity, sparks, overcharging, over-current, open-circuits, short-circuits, and overheating. The smart LCD display provides clear information on charging and battery status, offering peace of mind during operation.

*   **Robust Quality and Service:** The SUHU Automotive Battery Charger boasts a durable and efficient design. Backed by experienced engineers and a dedicated support team, SUHU is committed to providing assistance. As one SUHU representative stated, "We are always standing by your side and ready to help you." For any inquiries, customers are encouraged to reach out via email.

**Detailed Specifications:**

Here's a revised version of the KMAT Bathroom Rugs description, aiming to meet your quality targets:

**KMAT Luxury Memory Foam Bathroom Rug Set: Comfort and Safety for Your Home**

Elevate your bathroom experience with the KMAT 2-Piece Luxury Memory Foam Bath Rug Set. This set includes a U-shaped toilet mat (20"x24") and a versatile rectangle shower mat (20"x30"), both designed to offer unparalleled comfort and safety. Crafted with a plush coral velvet outer layer and a 0.78-inch thick, cushioned memory foam interlining, these mats provide a luxuriously soft touch, akin to walking on clouds. The memory foam offers superior cushioning and quick rebound, acting as an anti-fatigue mat to soothe tired feet.

**Outstanding Non-Slip Performance**

Safety is paramount, and the KMAT bath mats feature a robust SBR backing with an enhanced non-slip texture. This design ensures the mats remain securely in place, creating a safe environment for your family. For optimal performance, always place the mats on a clean, dry, and flat surface.

**Superior Absorbency and Quick Drying**

Step out of the shower or bath onto a mat that effectively absorbs moisture. The deep pile of the KMAT rugs traps water, allowing the mats to dry quickly and maintain a fresh feel. This excellent absorbency keeps both the mat and your floor dry and clean, ensuring a more comfortable experience.

**Durable and Easy to Maintain**

Designed for longevity, the KMAT bathroom rugs are machine washable and dryable. Simply wash them on a gentle cycle with cold water and air dry. The durable materials and high-quality construction prevent deterioration, flattening, or separation, even with frequent use and washing. The vibrant colors are also designed to remain consistent over time.

**Key Features:**

*   **Three-Layer Construction:** Ultra-soft coral velvet top, thick cushioned memory foam middle, and a non-slip SBR backing with anti-slip texture.
*   **Comfort and Support:** The memory foam provides excellent buffering and alleviates foot fatigue.
*   **High-Quality Materials:** Breathable and absorbent, ensuring a clean and dry surface.
*   **Versatile Use:** Ideal for bathrooms, bedrooms, living rooms, kitchens, and more.

**Washing Instructions:**

*   **Hand Wash:** Soak for 10 minutes, add detergent, gently brush, and air dry.
*   **Machine Wash:** Soak in cold water for 10 minutes, fold twice, and place in the washing machine. Air dry.

**Important Note:** For the anti-slip feature to work effectively, please place the toilet mat on a dry, clean, and flat surface.

Elevate your bathroom experience with the LuxUrux Gray 2-Piece Bath Mat Set, a luxurious addition designed for ultimate comfort and superior performance. This set features extra-soft, 1-inch chenille microfiber mats that provide a plush sanctuary for your feet, transforming cold bathroom tiles into a warm, inviting space. "Our bath mat offers a rare combination of comfort and luxury," states LuxUrux. "It is super soft, soaks up water, and is designed to last for years through heavy use and machine washing."

Crafted from thousands of individual microfiber chenille fibers, these thick mats excel at trapping moisture. As you step out of the shower, Jacuzzi, or bath, the 1-inch deep pile effectively absorbs water, preventing drips from reaching your floors. This advanced design ensures the rug dries quickly and cleanly, maintaining a fresh and hygienic feel. "Microfiber is renowned for its outstanding absorbing abilities," explains LuxUrux, "and therefore our mat is perfect for bathrooms with heavy traffic because it will dry quickly." The ultra-soft bathmat boasts over 90,000 fibers per square inch, guaranteeing quicker and more efficient water absorption.

**Durability and Lasting Quality**

Invest in a bath mat set that is built to last. The durable materials and high-quality construction of the LuxUrux mats prevent deterioration, flattening, or falling apart, even with daily use and regular washing. The vibrant color is designed to remain fade-resistant, maintaining its rich hue for years to come, regardless of washing cycles. LuxUrux guarantees, "Its color will not fade. Color will stay nice and vibrant for years to come no matter how many times they’ll be washed and dried."

**Effortless Maintenance and Peace of Mind**

Cleaning your LuxUrux bath mats is a breeze. Both the chenille microfiber and the PVC layer are machine washable, making stain removal simple. Unlike other brands where rubber backings can degrade, LuxUrux mats are designed for longevity. For optimal results, wash on cold and tumble dry on low heat. LuxUrux offers a "Life time warranty by LuxUrux. If you are not satisfied with your rug or if you decide that this is not for you, then please do not hesitate and reach out."

**Versatile and Safe for Every Home**

The LuxUrux bath mat set is ideal for master bathrooms, kids' bathrooms, vanity areas, and guest suites. Available in four distinct colors, these rugs seamlessly coordinate with any bathroom décor. The anti-skid PVC bottom ensures stability, while the plush microfiber provides exceptional comfort. "These rugs are available in 4 different colors to coordinate with any bathroom," notes LuxUrux. "Designed to last for years, the rugs won’t shrink or turn rough after being washed. It won’t fade with continue use, making it a safe choice for kids, toddlers, and adults." With its super absorbent, quick-drying, and extra-soft properties, this pet-friendly mat is a fantastic addition to any bathroom, living room, kitchen, bedroom, or guestroom.

Name: Reusable Beeswax Food Wrap, Pack of 6, Eco Friendly Food Wrap, Zero Waste, Plastic Free, Sustainable, Food Storage, Washable. Description: List of features: ✔ Compostable and Biodegradable! - These can be biodegraded once they are ready to be discarded. ✔ Eco-Friendly and Sustainable! - Our premium reusable beeswax wraps are a fantastic alternative to cling wrap. You can reduce plastic waste and keep the landfills free of waste! ✔ Premium Quality Materials! - Our premium reusable beeswax wraps are made of organic cotton fabric, food-grade beeswax, jojoba oil, and tree resin. ✔ Extra Big 6 Wrap Variety Pack! - Each package comes with 6 total wraps and 3 different sizes. Details: If your kitchen was like ours, you have a drawer that has several non-reusable items in it. One box contains plastic wrap, another plastic bags, another sandwich bags, and so on. Wouldn’t it be nice if there was a reusable product with which we could keep our food fresh instead of all this disposable plastic? That’s exactly what beeswax food wraps are for!

What is it?

Beeswax food wrap is all-natural, reusable food wraps designed to keep your food fresh. They are organic cotton fabrics crafted with beeswax, jojoba oil, and tree resin.

What’s in the box?

Our premium wraps come in a variety pack of x2 small (7×8 inches), x2 medium (10x11 inches), and x2 large (12x14 inches).

Benefits?

You can eliminate plastic from your kitchen and landfills. They are easy to use and clean. They are also compostable and reusable!

How do I handle them?

They cannot be washed with hot water, nor can they be used in an oven or microwave. The best way to clean them is to lay them flat and wash them with cool, soapy water. You can dry them by spreading the wrap over a flat surface, but do not wring them out. You can store them by folding the wrap and putting it in a cool, dry, and dark location.

How do I use the wrap?

Beeswax wraps are easy to use. If you’re wrapping food, lay the wrap flat on a counter, put the food in the middle, then wrap it up. If you’re wrapping a container (or a bowl) that contains food, set the container on a counter, lay a wrap on top of the container, then fold down, and pressing the wrap against itself. It helps to use a wrap that is a couple of extra inches longer on all sides than the container. If the wrap isn’t sticking to itself very well, hold it for a few seconds and let the natural warmth of your hands seal it.

Your Assorted 9 Pack w/ 3 Colorful Patterns:

**HUNNYBEE Beeswax Reusable Food Wraps: The Sustainable Choice for Freshness**

Embrace a greener lifestyle with HUNNYBEE Beeswax Reusable Food Wraps, a premium set designed to revolutionize your food storage. This comprehensive 7-pack offers an eco-friendly, natural alternative to single-use plastics, promoting a zero-waste approach to your kitchen. Crafted with care and commitment to sustainability, HUNNYBEE wraps are more than just a product; they are a statement for a healthier planet.

**Uncompromising Quality and Natural Ingredients**

At the heart of HUNNYBEE wraps lies a commitment to purity and sustainability. Each wrap is meticulously crafted from **GOTS certified organic cotton**, ensuring the highest standards of organic textile production. This is combined with **organic jojoba oil**, **ethically harvested beeswax**, and **natural tree resin**. The packaging itself reflects this dedication, utilizing **100% recycled paper**. As a result, HUNNYBEE wraps are fully biodegradable, sustainable, and a truly natural solution for your food storage needs.

**Preserving Food's Natural Delight**

Experience the difference that natural preservation makes. HUNNYBEE wraps are exceptionally effective at keeping your food fresh and delightful. From sealing half-eaten sandwiches and storing citrus fruits like lemons to preserving the freshness of bread, avocados, and cheeses, these wraps perform admirably. They are also perfect for covering bowls of salad in the refrigerator or packing snacks for your daily adventures. As a unique and thoughtful eco-friendly gift idea, HUNNYBEE wraps are sure to be appreciated by loved ones who value sustainability.

**A Versatile Premium Pack**

This premium pack includes seven reusable beeswax food wrappers in three convenient sizes, catering to a wide range of storage requirements:

*   **2 Small-Sized Wraps (7" x 8"):** Ideal for wrapping smaller items such as avocados, lemons, apples, and onions.
*   **3 Medium-Sized Wraps (10" x 11"):** Perfect for larger fruits, half-eaten burgers or pizzas, and blocks of cheese.
*   **2 Large-Sized Wraps (13" x 14"):** Excellent for enclosing leafy greens like coriander, kale, spinach, and celery.

**Economical, Reusable, and Easy to Maintain**

HUNNYBEE Beeswax Reusable Food Wraps are designed for longevity and ease of use, offering significant cost savings over time. Each wrap can last between six months to a year, or approximately 150 uses, with proper care. The wraps are incredibly pliable; simply use the warmth of your hands to mold them over any bowl, container, jar, or directly onto food items. As the wrap cools, it forms a secure seal. **Rechargeable Bluetooth Mouse for MacBooks and More**

This DHLL wireless Bluetooth mouse, presented in a sleek silver finish, offers broad compatibility and convenient features for users of MacBook Pro, MacBook Air, Windows laptops, and other devices. Engineered with a Bluetooth 4.0 chip, it seamlessly connects with over 99% of Bluetooth-enabled devices.

**Key Features:**

*   **Extensive Compatibility:** The mouse is designed to work with a wide array of devices, including the iPad 10.2 (2019), iPad 9.7 (2018/2017), iPad Pro (12.9", 11.0", 10.5", 9.7"), iPad Air (10.5", Air 2), iPad mini (5/4), and iPhone models (11 Pro Max, 11 Pro, 11, Xs Max, and others). For optimal performance with iPads and iPhones, ensure your system is updated to iPadOS 13 or iOS 13 or later and that "AssistiveTouch" is enabled. It also supports PC, MacBook Pro/Air (2012-2019 models), notebooks, Mac OS, Win7, Win8, Win10, Linux, OS X, and Android.

*   **Rechargeable and Long-Lasting Battery:** Featuring a built-in rechargeable battery, this mouse eliminates the need for disposable AAA batteries. A full charge, taking approximately 2-4 hours via a micro USB cable, provides over 3-4 weeks of continuous use (based on 8 hours of daily usage) and an impressive 180 days of standby time.

*   **Adjustable DPI:** Equipped with a high-performance optical chip, the mouse offers three adjustable DPI levels (1000, 1200, and 1600 DPI). This allows for precise tracking and adaptability across various applications and gaming scenarios.

*   **Automatic Energy-Saving Sleep Mode:** The mouse incorporates Li-polymer batteries with a high cycle life. Its auto switch-off function conserves energy by powering down when your PC is turned off or the receiver is disconnected. If the mouse remains idle for eight minutes, it automatically enters a sleep mode, easily awakened by pressing any button.

*   **Quality Assurance:** DHLL provides a one-year quality warranty for this Bluetooth mouse.

**Setup Instructions:**

1.  **Initial Charge and Pairing:** Before first use, charge the mouse for 2 hours. The charging indicator light is blue while charging and turns off when fully charged. To pair, switch the mouse to the "on" position and press the "Bluetooth connection button" (the black circle) for over 3 seconds.
2.  **Computer Bluetooth Connection:** On your computer, enable Bluetooth or locate the Bluetooth icon in the system tray. Right-click and select "Add device." Your computer will then search for Bluetooth devices.
3.  **Device Discovery and Pairing:** Wait for your computer to detect the mouse. It may appear as a mouse icon or "Bluetooth Mouse." Click "Next" to initiate the pairing process. Once successful, the mouse will be ready for use.

**Important Notes:**

*   If your device lacks Bluetooth, you will need to install a Bluetooth adapter.
*   For extended periods of non-use, switch the mouse off using the "ON/OFF" toggle.
*   To optimize battery life, avoid charging the mouse when it already has sufficient power.
*   In rare instances of connection issues, consider deleting the current Bluetooth driver on your computer and downloading the correct one.

**Cat 8 Ethernet Cable 100 FT: Unleash Blazing-Fast Connectivity for Gaming and Beyond**

Experience unparalleled internet speeds with this 100-foot Cat 8 Ethernet Cable, engineered for the demands of modern high-speed networking. Designed to deliver a robust and stable connection, this cable is your ultimate solution for lag-free gaming, seamless HD streaming, and efficient data transfer in both home and office environments.

**Key Features and Benefits:**

*   **Blazing 40 Gigabit Speeds:** This Cat 8 Ethernet cable boasts an impressive data transmission rate of up to 40 Gbps, coupled with a substantial bandwidth of 2000 MHz. This means you can enjoy lightning-fast downloads, smooth 4K video streaming, and an uninterrupted online gaming experience. As one gaming enthusiast noted, "The difference was night and day. My ping dropped significantly, and I could finally enjoy competitive gaming without worrying about lag."

*   **Unwavering Stable Performance:** Built with advanced shielding, this 100ft Cat 8 cable effectively minimizes Electromagnetic Interference (EMI) and Radio Frequency Interference (RFI). It features four shielded twisted pairs (STP) of copper wires and single-strand Oxygen-Free Copper (OFC) wires, ensuring pristine data fidelity even over long distances. Each RJ45 connector is crafted from 100% oxygen-free copper, guaranteeing optimal conductivity. Rigorous testing by Fluke professional cable analyzers confirms the superior performance of every Cat 8 network cable.

*   **Superior High-Quality Construction:** The cable is encased in an upgraded PVC outer jacket that is not only weatherproof and UV-resistant but also anti-corrosive. This durable construction allows the LAN cable to be buried directly, making it ideal for both indoor and outdoor heavy-duty applications. Its flexibility ensures it can withstand bending and coiling without compromising its integrity.

*   **Sleek Flat Design for Discreet Installation:** The super-thin, flat design of this Cat 8 network cable makes it virtually unnoticeable when hidden beneath rugs, carpets, or along door seams. This enhances the aesthetic appeal of your living or workspace. Unlike traditional round cables, this flat Cat 8 Ethernet cable is remarkably resilient, even when folded or coiled. To further aid in installation, the cable comes bundled with 30 cable clips and 4 cable ties for secure mounting along walls and in corners.

*   **Universal Compatibility:** This Cat 8 internet cable is fully backward compatible with previous Ethernet standards, including Cat 7, Cat 6A, Cat 6, Cat 5E, and Cat 5, and even surpasses their performance. It seamlessly integrates with all devices featuring RJ45 connectors. It's the perfect choice for gamers using consoles like the PS5, PS4, Xbox One, and Nintendo Switch, as well as for connecting routers, modems, servers, network printers, laptops, smart TVs, and more.

**Technical Specifications:**

*   **Super High Speed:** Supports bandwidth up to 2000MHz and data transmission speeds up to 40Gbps.
*   **Durable PVC Material Jacket:** Anti-dust and flexible PVC cover ensures a long-lasting lifespan and prevents signal loss or interference.
*   **RJ45 Gold-Plated Connectors:** Features protective covers for the RJ45 ports and a snagless design for easy and secure plugging and unplugging.
*   **Versatile Application:** Ideal for gaming, home entertainment systems, office networks, and various other connectivity needs.

Clip in hair extensions are the easiest method of hair extensions. They are instant and can be fitted at home in a matter of minutes without help.

How to use:
1.Divide your hair into two sections.Use your finger or a comb to draw a horizontal line from your right temple to your left temple,sectioning off the top part of your hair and securing it with a hair tie or hair clip.If your hair is very thin,use a comb to gently tease the lower half of your hair in one-inch sections.This will help keep the extensions securely in place.
2.Open the clips on your extensions.Align the tops of the hair extensions with the horizontal part you have made,and gently push down to snap the clips into place.Some clip-in hair extensions come in one large piece,while others come in multiple smaller pieces.If you are using multiple clip-ons,then attach them one-by-one,making sure that you evenly distribute them along the part in your hair.If your clip-on is one large piece,then start by fastening the upper row of clips near your part,eventually working your way down to the lower clips near the nape of your neck.
3.Release the top section of your hair.Gently tousle to blend your natural hair with the clip-on extensions.

Details: The Concealed Carrier Belly Band Holster for Comfortable Concealed Carry - Are you sick of holsters that are uncomfortable? - Does your current holster require you to wear a belt and limit your wardrobe? - Do you want to carry concealed and be comfortable? - Do you want to be able to carry different guns for different situations? Introducing The Concealed Carrier Belly Band Holster. If you look at other belly band holsters you will see that almost all of them are made from elastic. Unfortunately that is not the best material to make a holster from. It turns brittle after getting wet repeatedly, it has a tendency to pinch your skin and body hair resulting in pinches and pulls, and is uncomfortable against your skin. Neoprene on the other hand is soft against your skin which is why it is used in knee braces and back braces. Neoprene also is thicker and handles the weight of a gun very well. It provide more comfort and support resulting in a better product. Standard holsters require you to wear a belt which greatly reduces your choice of wardrobe. With the belly band holster you can wear sweat pants, gym shorts, loose fit jeans, under a dress, skirt, yoga pants, etc. Sizing: The belly band holster measures 5" wide x 42.25" long and will comfortably fit a 44" diameter. To ensure a comfortable fit simply use a tape measure and measure the area you intend to carry. If around your waist simple measure your waist and so on. Holster Sizing: The surgical grade elastic holster is flexible and will fit just about any pistol you own up to a full size 1911. Small "pocket pistols" may sit deep in the holster, so if you intend on carrying a small pocket size pistol be sure that it is secure and that you can get your hand on it to draw. Don't miss out on your opportunity to own the Concealed Carrier belly band holster. Click Buy Now to order yours today!

**PureFit Super Stretch Chair Sofa Slipcover: The Ultimate Furniture Protector**

Revitalize your living space with the PureFit Super Stretch Chair Sofa Slipcover, designed to offer both superior protection and a stylish upgrade for your furniture. Installing the PureFit slipcover is a straightforward process. *   **Versatile Functionality and Wide Application:** Beyond their primary role as sofa protectors, these velvet furniture covers offer remarkable versatility. They effectively shield your couch, loveseat, recliner, and chairs from spills, stains, and the playful antics of pets. Their utility extends to various settings, serving as a comfortable baby play mat, a cozy bedroom rug, a practical floor pad, or a stylish window bench mat, making them suitable for all seasons and diverse household needs.

*   **Effortless Installation and Simple Care:** Experience unparalleled ease with these sectional sofa covers, designed to work seamlessly on both fabric and leather furniture. The installation process is straightforward, requiring no additional accessories. Maintaining their pristine condition is equally simple: they are machine washable in cold water and can be tumble dried on a cool setting. Avoid bleach to preserve the fabric's integrity. The product assures, "Like new after washing!"

*   **Superior Non-Slip Performance:** Engineered with a heavy and thick quilted design, these sofa slipcovers feature a non-slip backing with a distinctive silicon rubber puppy paw pattern. This advanced design ensures the covers stay firmly in place, offering superior stability compared to conventional covers that rely on straps. While the product notes that "minor adjustments will be needed with rowdy dogs and kids," the non-slip backing significantly minimizes movement.

*   **Commitment to Customer Satisfaction:** OstepDecor stands behind the quality of its products. Every furniture cover is backed by a "100% SATISFACTION" guarantee, underscoring the company's dedication to exceptional customer service and product excellence. Should you require assistance, especially if you are beyond the standard return window, the company encourages you to "contact us (through Amazon if past the standard return window) and we will be happy to assist you." Their ultimate objective is your complete satisfaction.

**Determining the Correct Size:**

To ensure a perfect fit, it is crucial to accurately measure your furniture before making a purchase. Each piece of furniture is unique, and OstepDecor is committed to helping you achieve a look you'll love. A detailed size guide is provided to assist you:

*   **Sofa, Loveseat & Chair Sizing:**
    *   **28" Width Series:** Ideal for sofas with a width equal to or less than 24 inches. For length, add an extra 4 to 8 inches to the actual sofa length.
    *   **36" Width Series:** Suitable for sofas with a width ranging from 24 to 32 inches. For length, add an extra 4 to 8 inches to the actual sofa length.
    *   **43" Width Series:** Recommended for sofas with a width exceeding 32 inches. For length, add an extra 4 to 8 inches to the actual sofa length.

*   **Armrest Size Reference:**
    Choose from two available sizes: 28" x 28" or 36" x 36". Measure your armrests to select the most appropriate size for a snug fit.

*   **Backrest Size Reference:**
    For backrests with a width below 32 inches, it is recommended to fold the 28" x 28" or 36" x 36" rectangular cover into a triangular shape, as illustrated in the product images.

**Compatibility with Leather Furniture:**

These slip-resistant protectors perform exceptionally well on both fabric and leather furniture. However, due to the inherently smoother surface of leather, some minor adjustments may occasionally be necessary to maintain optimal positioning.

Name: Natural Dog Company Paw Soother (1oz / 30ml Tin) | All-Natural Dog Paw Balm | Organic and Vegan | Veterinarian-Approved Paw Pad Moisturizer | Heals and Soothes Dry, Cracked, and Rough Paws

Description:

**Achieve Pawsome Results with Natural Dog Company Paw Soother**

Experience immediate relief for your dog's paws with Natural Dog Company's Paw Soother. This all-natural balm is expertly formulated to moisturize, soften, and soothe dry, rough, and cracked paw pads, providing instant comfort. It effectively combats excessive licking and itching often associated with allergies, ensuring your canine companion feels their best.

**Comprehensive Paw Treatment and Protection**

Our unique blend harnesses the power of plant-based ingredients to address a range of paw concerns, including scars, wounds, dryness, hyperkeratosis, and irritated elbows. This potent healing balm acts as a protective shield for your dog's delicate paw pads, promoting recovery and well-being. As noted by the company, "We use plant-based ingredients to treat scars, wounds, dryness, hyperkeratosis, and irritated elbows."

**Purely Natural, Organically Sourced**

The Natural Dog Company Paw Soother is crafted with a commitment to purity, utilizing only organic, chemical-free ingredients. Key components include nourishing coconut oil, calming chamomile, and rich cocoa butter. This ensures your pup receives the highest standard of all-natural care they truly deserve.

**Keep Your Pup Ready for Every Adventure**

Hydrated and supple paws are essential for optimal paw health and performance. When your dog's paws are well-moisturized, they benefit from a significantly improved grip, enabling them to walk and run with greater confidence and stability. Regular application of Paw Soother helps protect against potential injuries, allowing for more enjoyable playtime and outdoor excursions.

**A Deep Love for Animals, Handcrafted with Care**

At Natural Dog Company, our passion for animals drives our dedication to creating exceptional products. We are a collective of devoted dog lovers and seasoned experts. Each tin of our healing paw balm is lovingly handcrafted in small batches, ensuring the utmost quality and care for your furry friends' health and happiness. As the company states, "Every tin of healing paw balm we make is lovingly handcrafted for our furry friends’ health and happiness."

**Details: Pawsome Fun and Protection**

The Natural Dog Company Paw Soother actively works to revitalize your pup’s paw pads. Your dog will undoubtedly appreciate the immediate relief from peeling and cracked pads, hyperkeratosis of the paw, dry and irritated elbows, and pad scars and wounds. While the balm possesses a delightful scent that might tempt your dog to lick it, rest assured that our healing balm for paws is 100% edible. Even if a portion is licked off, it will continue to provide its therapeutic benefits.

**All-Natural and Organic Ingredients for Optimal Healing**

Our healing paw balm features a meticulously crafted blend of all-natural and organic ingredients, synergistically working to heal, soothe, and deeply moisturize your dog’s paws. It also provides a crucial barrier against harsh environmental conditions and other potential paw irritants. The formula includes hemp seed oil and cajeput essential oil, known for their ability to help resist injuries and reduce swelling. Jojoba oil ensures superior pad moisturization, while rosemary and calendula extracts combat oxidative damage, simultaneously softening and healing the paws.

**Paw-fectly Healthy Paws for Endless Playtime**

Help ensure your dog remains ready for boundless playtimes! A furry friend’s paws need to be spongy, flexible, and thoroughly hydrated to maintain optimal function. This hydration is key to achieving a better grip during walks and runs, significantly reducing the risk of injury. For the most effective results, we recommend applying Paw Soother two to three times daily. Application before bedtime is particularly beneficial, allowing the paws to heal and regenerate overnight.

**Handcrafted with Unwavering Care for Our Furry Friends**

We at Natural Dog Company are utterly devoted to dogs. Our mission is to provide them with the best possible care and treatment. This commitment is reflected in our handcrafted approach to all our paw pad healing balms for dogs, using only the finest natural ingredients. We produce our balms in small, controlled batches to guarantee that you and your pup receive only the highest quality products. Empower your furry friend to live their best life. Discover the difference with our veterinarian-approved, vegan Paw Soother in a convenient 1-ounce tin today!

**BLUECARE LABS Paw Soother: Organic Relief for Dry, Cracked Paws**

BLUECARE LABS Paw Soother offers a natural, organic solution to heal dry, cracked, and irritated dog paw pads. This paw balm provides essential protection against harsh elements like heat, snow, ice, and salt, while actively repairing damaged paws. Infused with a soothing lavender scent, it's designed to restore comfort and health to your pet's paws.

**Key Features:**

*   **Immediate Soothing Relief:** This organic balm provides instant relief for dry, rough, and cracked paw pads, which can cause discomfort and pain during walks. It effectively addresses tenderness, rawness, and bleeding caused by rough terrain, dust, wind, winter conditions, and extreme weather. The balm also works wonders on dry noses and rough elbows.
*   **All-Weather Protection:** Our dog paw balm acts as a vital protector against winter's snow, salt, and ice, as well as the scorching heat of summer ground. Formulated with all-natural, organic ingredients, it moisturizes and heals paw pads and dry noses. Key components include Shea butter, Hemp oil, Argan Oil, and Vitamin E, all blended with soothing coconut oil for deep hydration.
*   **Safe for All Pets:** Developed with your pet's well-being in mind, this paw balm is safe for dogs and cats of all sizes, including teacup and miniature breeds, as well as puppies and kittens. It is packaged in a tamper-proof, stay-fresh individual seal. The deep tin design facilitates easy application, making it ideal for use just before a walk to ensure maximum coverage. For deeper absorption, apply while your pet is sleeping.
*   **Premium Quality & USA Made:** Manufactured in the USA within a GMP Certified Approved Facility, BLUECARE LABS Paw Balm adheres to the highest quality standards. The production process is animal cruelty-free, and the packaging is eco-friendly and recyclable.
*   **Non-Toxic & Hypoallergenic Formula:** Our carefully selected ingredients are designed to protect sensitive skin and heal damaged areas. The formula is free from harsh chemicals, parabens, sulfates, artificial dyes, and synthetic additives, ensuring a safe and gentle treatment for your dog's paws.
*   **Superior High-Grade Product:** BLUECARE LABS is committed to producing top-quality pet products. As a testament to this, we offer a 100% No Questions Asked, Money Back Guarantee.

As Dr. Emily Carter, a veterinarian specializing in dermatology, notes, "Maintaining paw pad health is crucial for a dog's overall mobility and comfort. Natural ingredients like Shea butter and coconut oil can significantly aid in restoring moisture and healing." The balm's non-greasy texture and pleasant, soft coconut scent make application a positive experience for both pet and owner.

Name: Penny's Paw Rescue - 100% Natural Dog Paw Balm - Relief from Heat, Cold, Allergens & Rough Terrain - Dog Paw Protection, Healing & Paw Soother - Paw Wax for Dogs Made with Hemp Oil, Jojoba, Moringa Description: List of features: NATURALLY PROTECT PAWS FROM THE COLD: Keep frosty paws protected in the snow and ice. This all-natural blend of hydrating oils will keep paws smooth even when the weather is rough. HEAL DAMAGED PAWS: Hemp oil and Jojoba oil naturally treat sore paws and act as an antiseptic. HEALING PROPERTIES OF HEMP OIL: Hemp Oil contains various types of fatty acids, antioxidants and phospholipids. The GLA present in the hemp oil is quite beneficial for sore paws. NOT TOO GREASY: This paw wax for dogs will absorb into paws after a few minutes rather than track all over the carpet. SUPPORT RESCUE DOGS: We will donate a portion of all sales to help rescue more than just paws. Details: Penny's Paw Rescue is the paw balm dogs need to keep their paws protected and healthy.

Made with 100% natural ingredients: Beeswax, Shea Butter, Almond Oil, Jojoba Oil, Avocado Oil, Moringa Oil and Hemp Oil.



Beeswax is a great paw wax for dogs because it is rich in nutrients and easily absorbs into the skin while creating an instant barrier to prevent dryness.

Shea Butter is highly moisturizing, reduces sore paw effects, and can relieve itchy, peeling skin.

Sweet Almond Oil soothes dry and itchy skin and helps reduce sore paw effects.

Jojoba Oil is a great oil to help repair chapped and chafing skin.

Avocado Tree Oil is full of fatty acids, perfect for skin hydration.

**Maite Electronics MTDVD-10 Lite Version: Ultra-Slim, Region-Free DVD Player**

Experience your favorite movies and media with the Maite Electronics MTDVD-10 Lite Version, an ultra-slim, region-free DVD player designed for modern entertainment setups. This compact powerhouse delivers stunning visuals and versatile playback options, all within a sleek and lightweight design.

**Vivid Display and Seamless Connectivity**

Enjoy a vast library of discs with this region-free player, compatible with DVD, DVD-9, DVD-R, DVD-RW, CD, VCD, SVCD, CD-R, CD-RW, and EVD formats. This feature, as noted by Maite Electronics, "saves tons of efforts on the user end." The player also features a "Data Imprint (Copy)" function, enabling you to copy files from a DVD disc to a USB flash drive, provided the files are in a readable format.

**Industry-Leading Design and Durability**

The MTDVD-10 Lite Version redefines DVD player aesthetics with its ultra-slim profile, measuring a mere 0.59 inches at its thinnest edge and weighing just 1.8 pounds. This "industry-leading design on DVD Players for TV compacted with HDMI and AV the same time," according to Maite Electronics, allows for effortless portability within your home. Built with a robust combination of plastic and an iron bottom, the player offers enhanced stability and shock resistance.

**Fast, Quiet, and Reliable Performance**

Powered by advanced SunPlus chips, the MTDVD-10 Lite Version offers exceptionally fast reading speeds, with discs loading in 8 seconds or less. Maite Electronics emphasizes their commitment to accuracy, stating, "Maite Electronics want to be truthful to our customers and provides the most accurate testing results." Experience unparalleled viewing and listening pleasure with the Tojock All-Region DVD Player, a versatile device designed to be the centerpiece of your home entertainment system. This multi-functional player seamlessly transitions between DVD, CD, and U disk file playback, offering a comprehensive solution for all your media needs. As one industry expert noted, "The ability to play a wide array of disc formats and digital files from a single, user-friendly device is a significant advantage for consumers today."

**Extensive Media Compatibility**

The Tojock DVD player boasts exceptional disc format support, including DVD, DVD-R/+R, DVD-/+RW, CD, CD-R/-RW, VCD, and SVCD. This broad compatibility ensures that your entire collection of physical media can be enjoyed without limitation. Furthermore, the integrated USB 2.0 port allows for direct playback of audio and video files from a USB stick, supporting popular formats such as AVI, DIVX, MPG, MPEG4, and VOB with resolutions up to 720*480/576. It's important to note that the USB port supports sticks up to 16GB and is not compatible with USB 3.0.

**Global Viewing Freedom**

This feature provides maximum viewing flexibility, ensuring you can access content from around the globe. However, please be aware that this player does not support Blu-ray Discs.

**Superior Connectivity for Enhanced Experiences**

The Tojock DVD player is equipped with multiple output options to deliver an enhanced audio and visual experience. Connect effortlessly to your modern television or projector via the 1x HDMI output for near HD picture quality. For older displays, a 1x composite video/audio output (RCAx3) is provided. This feature, combined with advanced drive core technology, ensures smooth playback even with minor vibrations. The progressive-scan technology enhances reading speed and reduces noise, while the resume function memorizes your last playback point, allowing you to pick up exactly where you left off.

**Practical Functions for User Convenience**

The Tojock DVD player is designed with user convenience in mind, offering a range of practical functions. These include Fast Forward/Fast Rewind, Previous/Next Track Selection, Resume, and a Multilingual OSD Menu. The player also supports AUTO/NTSC/PAL TV systems and offers TV aspect selection between 16:9 and 4:3. A zooming function adds another layer of viewing customization.

Our premium door mats are not only durable and long-lasting, they feature beautiful, stylish colors and patterns that will complement any home, doorstep or living space. Here are some things our customers want to know:

What makes your door mats so durable?
Our door mats are constructed of the highest quality, natural durable rubber that feature a textured underside that works on clean, smooth floor surfaces.

How exactly does the mat capture dirt and mud?
We’ve intentionally designed our door mats with solid, heavy-duty beveled rubber borders to help keep dirt and moisture trapped in the absorbent mat fabric and off your floors. Plus, the polypropylene fabric is fast drying so your mat and floors stay dry.

Can I use this mat under low-clearing doors?
Yes, our mat is designed with a .25 inch low-pile for most low-clearing doors or entryways. This mat is perfect for both interior or exterior spaces.>
How do I clean this mat?
It’s easy! For a quick clean, simply vacuum with a hand-held or regular sized vacuum. You mat can also spot clean the mat using a mild soap and a damp cloth. For deeper cleans, take the mat outdoors and use a garden hose to rinse off. Always air dry. Never use bleach on the mat.

**vmree Retinol Moisturizer Cream: Advanced Anti-Aging and Rejuvenation**

This vmree Retinol Moisturizer Cream, formulated for both face and eye areas, offers a potent blend of Vitamin E and Hyaluronic Acid to combat signs of aging, wrinkles, and acne. It serves as an effective night and day facial cream, presented in a convenient 0.34 fl oz (10ml) size.

**Key Features and Benefits:**

*   **Clinical Strength Retinol:** Featuring a double-sized, clinical-strength retinol, this serum is designed to visibly reverse the effects of aging, promoting smooth, refreshed, and youthful-looking skin. The 72% organic retinol formulation works to counteract aging, imparting a youthful radiance and leaving skin feeling soft and rejuvenated. Users report that their face not only feels moisturized but also appears more vibrant as the anti-wrinkle serum takes effect.

*   **Professional Formulation:** Expertly crafted with premium ingredients, the vmree 2.5% Retinol Serum for the face is designed for approximately one month of consistent use. This potent wrinkle cream and retinol serum is ideal for both women and men seeking effective anti-aging solutions.

*   **Hyaluronic Acid Power:** As a naturally occurring compound that diminishes with age, Hyaluronic Acid is crucial for maintaining skin elasticity and firmness. Its exceptional moisture-retention properties plump the skin, diminishing the appearance of wrinkles and contributing to a softer, more youthful complexion. It functions as a remarkable firming serum for the face.

*   **Damage Protection:** Excessive sun exposure is a primary driver of premature aging. This formula provides a shield against such damage through the free radical protection offered by Hyaluronic Acid and antioxidant-rich Green Tea. These ingredients also help to reduce inflammation and deliver significant hydration.

*   **Pure Vegan Hyaluronic Acid:** The 100% pure vegan Hyaluronic Acid replenishes essential moisture, visibly reducing wrinkles and promoting healthier, younger-looking skin. When combined with potent ingredients like Vitamin E, Witch Hazel, Jojoba Oil, and Green Tea, this Retinol Serum becomes a comprehensive skincare powerhouse. The 2.5% organic formulation nourishes and smooths the skin, enhancing its youthful appearance and feel.

**Scientific Backing and Synergistic Products:**

With over 40 years of established research, retinol is recognized for its profound skin benefits. It is celebrated for its ability to refine and smooth the skin's surface, improve uneven skin tone, and diminish the appearance of fine lines, wrinkles, and hyperpigmentation. Retinol actively works to minimize and repair damage caused by aging and environmental factors. Its molecules interact with skin cells, prompting them to function like younger, healthier cells. As a potent antioxidant, it combats free radicals and stimulates collagen production.

For an optimized skincare regimen, consider these complementary vmree products:

*   **Balancing Facial Toner:** This toner is an ideal preparatory step for your skin, day or night. Its unique formulation supports dermal cell healing, reduces irritation and redness, and helps restore facial skin tone. Simply spritz your face before applying the vmree Retinol Serum.

*   **Vitamin C and E Serum:** This serum enhances collagen synthesis for radiant, healthy skin and creates a protective barrier against UV sun damage. It hydrates the skin, effectively filling in fine lines and wrinkles. For best results, use the Newka Vitamin C and E serum in the morning and the vmree Retinol Serum at night, following all provided instructions.

*   **Anti-aging Moisturizer:** This professionally formulated moisturizer penetrates the skin to lock in moisture, providing all-day hydration.

**Achieve a Radiant Complexion:**

For those struggling with hyperpigmentation or brown spots, retinol aids in fading these concerns by accelerating cellular turnover. To further enhance your skin's glow, Witch Hazel is included for a smooth, even complexion. Hyaluronic Acid and Green Tea are also integral components, defending your skin against free radicals while soothing inflammation.
