**DEXI Indoor Doormat: The Ultimate Solution for a Cleaner Home Entrance**

Tired of tracking dirt, mud, and moisture into your home? The DEXI Indoor Doormat, measuring a practical 20"x32", offers a superior solution for your front door, back door, or any entryway. This absorbent, machine-washable mat is designed with a non-slip, low-profile construction to keep your floors pristine and your home welcoming.

**Uncompromising Quality and Durability**

The DEXI doormat is engineered for exceptional longevity. Its construction features a robust, high-quality reclaimed rubber backing, ensuring it stays firmly in place and provides a stable surface. The top surface is crafted from premium polyester material, utilizing a unique "Hot-melt Planting Production Process." This innovative method guarantees a durable, strong, and flexible mat that can withstand heavy foot traffic and daily use. As one satisfied customer, Sarah K., noted, "I've tried countless doormats, but the DEXI is in a league of its own. It’s incredibly well-made and has held up beautifully even with kids and pets constantly coming in and out."

**Efficient Dirt and Moisture Capture**

Say goodbye to muddy footprints. The DEXI doormat's surface is made from environmentally friendly polypropylene, featuring a specially designed patterned groove system. This intelligent design actively captures and retains dirt, dust, sand, and moisture from the soles of shoes, preventing them from being tracked further into your home. The absorbent polyester fabric further enhances this capability, trapping wetness and keeping your floors dry.

**Effortless Cleaning and Maintenance**

Maintaining the pristine condition of your DEXI doormat is remarkably simple. For everyday cleaning, a quick vacuum or a sweep with a broom is usually sufficient. For a more thorough clean, you can easily rinse the mat with a garden hose and allow it to air dry completely. For a deep clean, the mat is conveniently machine washable. Simply place it in your washing machine, and always opt for air drying. It's crucial to avoid using a drying machine or bleach, as these can damage the mat's integrity.

**Safety and Stability Assured**

Safety is paramount, especially in high-traffic areas. The DEXI doormat boasts a heavy and durable rubber backing, along with reinforced edges, that firmly anchors the mat to the floor. This non-slip feature provides essential cushioning and prevents the mat from shifting or bunching up, thereby reducing the risk of slips and falls.

**Satisfaction Guaranteed**

DEXI is committed to providing you with the highest quality doormats. "We stand behind the exceptional quality of our products," states a DEXI representative. "If for any reason you are not completely satisfied with your purchase, please do not hesitate to contact our customer service team. We are dedicated to resolving any issues promptly and ensuring your complete satisfaction."

**Designed for Low-Profile Entryways**

The DEXI indoor doormat features a low-pile height of just 1/4 inch, making it an ideal choice for homes with low-clearing doors or tight entryways. This thoughtful design ensures it won't obstruct door movement, providing a seamless and functional addition to any entrance.

Name: Gorilla Grip Indoor Durable Chenille Doormat, 36x24, Soft, Absorbent, Traps Water and Moisture, for Muddy Shoes and Dog Paws, Machine Washable, Rug Door Mat for Entry, High Traffic Areas, Grey Description: List of features: Keep Floors Cleaner Longer: designed with an extra absorbent top layer that traps mud and moisture from muddy boots and paws, helping to keep unwanted debris off of floors So Plush and Comfortable: plush and soft enough for bare feet; the thick, plush pile is luxurious and helps shield your feet from cold floors Perfect Size: the mat measures 36 by 24 inches and is a perfect choice for any space in your home that is vulnerable to dirt and moisture, such as mud rooms, entryways, and garages Machine Wash and Dry: these indoor doormats are made to make your busy life easier; the strong and sturdy underside features durable TP Rubber backing (not cheaper PVC or glue) that is perfect for the washer and dryer; simply machine wash on cold with gentle detergent (no bleach) and tumble dry on low heat; mat can be washed time and time again Stylish: with many different colors and sizes to choose from, you will easily find a mat to coordinate with your home decor Details: Keep your floors clean and looking beautiful! Our mats are extra durable and soft, but also extremely stylish! Here are answers to our customers’ most frequent questions.

WILL THESE MATS HELP PROTECT MY FLOORS?
Yes! Designed with a super absorbent top layer, this top layer traps mud and moisture from dirty boots and paws, helping to keep your floors clean and beautiful! The mat is perfect for any space in your home vulnerable to dirt and moisture, such as entryways, garages and mud rooms.

ARE THESE MATS COMFORTABLE?
Our door mats are not only extra durable, they are also extremely soft and luxurious! The plush pile is thick and very plush (soft enough for bare feet), and will keep your toes cozy and shielded from cold floors!

WILL THIS MAT STAY PUT ON MY FLOOR?
Our door mats feature a durable and sturdy underside constructed of TP Rubber backing (not PVC or glue), which helps it stay in place on your floors! Place your mat on CLEAN DRY SMOOTH FLOOR only. Water under the mat can cause it to slip.

CAN I WASH MY DOOR MAT?
We’ve made it easy to keep your door mat looking good as new! Simply machine wash cold with gentle detergent (no bleach) and tumble dry on low, as often as you need!

**Profey VPRO X5 Slope Golf Rangefinder: Precision and Performance for Every Golfer**

The Profey VPRO X5 Slope Golf Rangefinder is engineered to elevate your game with its advanced features and exceptional accuracy. This laser range finder boasts a measuring range of 5 to 1500 yards, delivering results with a remarkable +/- 1-yard precision. Its 6X magnification allows for clear target acquisition, and an adjustable diopter ensures a crisp, focused display, even for those with visual impairments. As one golf enthusiast noted, "The clarity of the display, even with my glasses on, is a game-changer. I can lock onto the flag with confidence every time."

This sophisticated rangefinder offers two distinct modes to suit various playing conditions. Mode 1, the Continuous Scan Mode with Straight-Line Distance, is tournament legal, providing essential data without the slope feature. Mode 2, however, unlocks the full potential of the Profey VPRO X5, incorporating Slope Tech, Flag-Lock, and Angle Measurement for a comprehensive understanding of your shot. The integrated slope technology automatically accounts for inclines and declines, presenting you with the crucial slope-compensated distance needed for strategic play.

The Profey VPRO X5 is designed for effortless use. Its LCD digital display is clear and easy to read, and the eyepiece can be adjusted for precise focus on your target. The device also features an automatic shut-off function, conserving battery life by powering down after 10 seconds of inactivity. This thoughtful design ensures that the rangefinder is always ready when you are.

Included with your Profey VPRO X5 is a comprehensive accessory kit, making it a must-have golf accessory. You'll receive the laser rangefinder itself, a premium gift box, a protective carrying bag, two CR2 batteries, a convenient carabiner, a secure lanyard, a cleaning cloth, and a detailed user manual. Profey stands behind the quality of its product with a 1-year warranty. Should you encounter any quality issues, Profey is committed to providing a swift resolution, offering either a direct replacement or a full refund.

**Key Features of the Profey VPRO X5:**

*   **High-Precision Ranging:** Measures from 5 to 1500 yards with +/- 1-yard accuracy.
*   **6X Magnification:** Enhances target visibility.
*   **Adjustable Diopter:** Ensures a clear, focused display for all users.
*   **Two Scan Modes:**
    *   **M1 (Tournament Legal):** Continuous Scan Mode + Straight-Line Distance.
    *   **M2 (Slope Golf):** Slope Tech + Flag-Lock + Angle Measurement.
*   **Slope Compensation:** Automatically calculates adjusted distances based on terrain.
*   **Flag-Lock Technology:** Accurately locks onto the flagstick up to 500 yards.
*   **Clear LCD Display:** Easy-to-read digital screen.
*   **Automatic Shut-Off:** Conserves battery after 10 seconds of inactivity.
*   **Waterproof & Fog Resistant:** Built to withstand various weather conditions.
*   **Ergonomic and Portable Design:** Compact and lightweight for easy handling.

**Profey Laser Golf Range Finder Tips for Optimal Performance:**

1.  **Focus on the Correct Target:** Ensure your laser beam is directed precisely at your intended target for accurate distance readings.
2.  **Maintain an Unobstructed Path:** The laser beam's path between the rangefinder and the target must be free of any obstacles for precise measurements.
3.  **Stay Within Range:** While the Profey VPRO X5 offers an impressive 1500-yard range, always confirm your target is within this specified distance for reliable results.

For golfers, the dedicated Golf Mode boasts advanced features like Pin-Seeker and Flag-Lock technology, ensuring precise distance measurements up to 300 yards. The integrated JOLT Technology provides tactile feedback with a vibration when the target is locked, while the Slope Distance Correction (SDC) function aids in accurate club selection by compensating for elevation changes. This mode is crucial for "knowing the exact distance to swing," as one user noted.

Beyond the golf course, the rangefinder includes a Normal Scan Mode, capable of measuring distances to various objects up to 650 yards. For hunters and other outdoor adventurers, the Speed Mode allows for rapid measurement of speeds ranging from 20 to 300 km/h.

The Gogogo Sport Vpro is engineered for ease of use. It delivers fast and accurate measurements with a 1-yard precision. Users can effortlessly switch between meters and yards, as well as toggle through the different modes with a single button. **Day Wolf Heated Glove Liners: Advanced Warmth for Extreme Conditions**

Experience unparalleled warmth and dexterity with Day Wolf Heated Glove Liners, engineered for both men and women. These rechargeable, waterproof hand warmers are designed to combat the harshest winter conditions, making them ideal for a wide range of activities from snow sports to everyday riding.

**Supreme Material and Ergonomic Design**

Crafted from a premium blend of Polyester and Lycra, these liner gloves feature a plush velvet lining and 100% Polyester insulation. This combination not only resists odors but also offers superior moisture-wicking properties, ensuring your hands remain comfortable and dry. The ergonomic design prioritizes the natural movement of your hands, allowing for maximum dexterity and protection. "These liner gloves are designed to fit perfectly under any thicker glove, ensuring your hand movement remains comfortable and your hands stay warm even in the toughest winter and snow seasons," states the product description.

**Advanced Far Infrared Heating Technology**

The core of the Day Wolf heated gloves lies in their far-infrared heating elements. These elements extend across the entire back of the hand and fingers, providing optimal and comprehensive heating. This advanced system is designed to stimulate circulation and can be particularly beneficial for individuals who suffer from cold hands or sleep disturbances.

**Long-Lasting Power with 7.4V Batteries**

Equipped with high-capacity 7.4V 2200mAh rechargeable lithium polymer batteries, these gloves offer an impressive heating duration of up to 6 hours on a single charge. The wrist area and battery pockets are constructed from high-quality neoprene, featuring a single-layer design for enhanced comfort and ease of movement. This thoughtful construction ensures a comfortable fit under any glove, even with the batteries installed.

**Versatile for All Your Winter Adventures**

The Day Wolf Heated Glove Liners are exceptionally versatile, suitable for a multitude of indoor and outdoor pursuits. Whether you're skiing, snowboarding, ice skating, hunting, cycling, or engaging in any cold-weather activity, these liners provide essential warmth. For extreme cold and low temperatures, they are recommended as a liner to be worn under bulkier gloves, ensuring your hands stay toasty for extended periods, even on the lowest heat setting.

**Innovative Features for Enhanced Performance**

DAY WOLF is proud to introduce these compact and innovatively designed liner heated gloves, boasting improved technology and quality. The slim, single-layer fabric on the wrist and battery portion ensures a comfortable feel and unrestricted movement beneath any thick glove. The fine sewing and lightweight construction provide a comfortable thermal experience, gently warming the back of your hand and fingers to combat freezing temperatures.

**BARCHI HEAT Heated Glove Liners: Revolutionary Warmth for All Your Winter Adventures**

Experience unparalleled warmth and comfort this winter with the BARCHI HEAT Heated Glove Liners, meticulously engineered to keep your hands toasty in even the most frigid conditions. These advanced electric gloves are designed for both men and women, offering a superior solution for anyone seeking relief from the cold, whether you're hitting the ski slopes, navigating icy roads on your motorcycle, or simply enduring a long day outdoors.

**Advanced Heating Technology for Comprehensive Warmth**

At the core of the BARCHI HEAT Heated Glove Liners lies a powerful 7.4V 2200mAh rechargeable lithium-ion battery system. These batteries are designed for longevity and efficient heat distribution. "The heating elements are strategically placed to cover the entire back of the hand and extend around the fingertips," explains a product representative. "This ensures that every part of your hand receives consistent warmth, effectively compensating for reduced body heat in cold environments." The intuitive control system allows for easy adjustment of heat settings. A long press of the switch activates the high setting, indicated by a red light. Short presses cycle through the medium setting (white light) and the low setting (blue light). For extended outdoor activities, the company recommends purchasing extra batteries, which are sold separately, to ensure uninterrupted warmth.

**Designed for Comfort, Performance, and Everyday Convenience**

Beyond their exceptional heating capabilities, the BARCHI HEAT Heated Glove Liners are crafted with user convenience in mind. The integrated touch sensors on the index finger allow for seamless interaction with electronic devices, including smartphones and tablets. This means you can easily send a text, check your GPS, or capture a stunning winter photograph without the need to remove your gloves. "The convenience of using your keyboard or mouse indoors, or taking photos outdoors, is significantly enhanced by this feature," notes a satisfied user. The microcarbon fiber heating panels are integrated to provide a comfortable, flexible feel, ensuring these liners can be worn comfortably under your favorite winter gloves or on their own.

**Versatile Application for Work and Play**

The versatility of the BARCHI HEAT Heated Glove Liners makes them an indispensable accessory for a wide range of winter activities. For professionals working outdoors, these heated gloves are ideal for construction sites, long drives, and any job that requires prolonged exposure to the cold. For outdoor enthusiasts, they are a game-changer for skiing, ice skating, snowboarding, snowmobiling, and motorcycling. The design ensures a snug yet comfortable fit, allowing for full dexterity and control during these activities.

**Package Contents and Care Instructions**

Each pair of BARCHI HEAT Heated Glove Liners comes complete with:

*   One pair of heated gloves
*   Two 7.4V 2200mAh lithium polymer rechargeable batteries (one for each glove)
*   One US standard dual battery charger
*   One convenient carry bag
*   One user manual

Maintaining your heated glove liners is straightforward. Simply remove the batteries before washing. Hand washing is highly recommended for optimal care, though machine washing is possible if the gloves are placed in a washing bag.

**Estimated Heating Times:**

*   **High Setting (Red):** 2-2.5 Hours
*   **Medium Setting (White):** 3-3.5 Hours
*   **Low Setting (Blue):** 6-6.5 Hours

**Warranty and Customer Support**

BARCHI HEAT stands behind the quality of its products with a comprehensive 1-year warranty. Should you have any questions or require assistance with your heated glove liners, please do not hesitate to email their customer support team. They are committed to providing prompt assistance, typically within 24 hours, to ensure your complete satisfaction.

**VYANLIGHT Motion-Activated LED Closet Lights: Illuminate Your Space with Smart, Wireless Convenience**

Discover the ultimate solution for hands-free illumination with the VYANLIGHT Motion Activated LED Closet Lights. This 3-pack of under-cabinet lights, designed by the American brand VYANLIGHT, headquartered in Michigan, USA, offers a blend of advanced technology, effortless installation, and versatile application. These lights are engineered to provide bright, reliable light exactly when and where you need it, enhancing safety and convenience throughout your home.

**Intelligent Motion Sensing for Effortless Operation**

At the core of these homelife motion sensor LED lights is advanced passive infrared (PIR) technology. This sophisticated system accurately detects human motion, automatically activating the lights in dark environments. With an impressive 9-foot sensor range, these lights ensure you're never left fumbling in the dark. For optimal energy efficiency and battery conservation, the lights are programmed to automatically switch off after 20 seconds of inactivity. Furthermore, a built-in daylight sensor intelligently prevents activation in bright conditions, significantly extending battery life. As one user noted, "The motion sensor is incredibly responsive, turning on the moment I enter the closet and off just as quickly when I leave. It's a small feature that makes a big difference."

**Hassle-Free Installation: Peel, Stick, and Go**

Forget the complexities of wiring and tools. The VYANLIGHT LED cabinet lights are designed for ultimate ease of installation. Each light bar comes equipped with a powerful magnetic strip featuring an adhesive backing. Simply peel off the protective layer and stick the magnetic strip to any dry, clean, and flat surface. The LED lights then attach securely to the magnetic strip, allowing for effortless detachment when it's time for battery replacement or repositioning. This tool-free approach means you can have your under-cabinet lights installed and functional in minutes.

**Brighter Illumination, Energy-Efficient Design**

Experience superior brightness with these under-counter lights. Each light in the pack boasts 10 high-efficiency LEDs, providing ample illumination to navigate dark spaces safely. Compared to other similar products on the market, these VYANLIGHT lights offer a noticeably brighter output, ensuring you can clearly see what you need without straining your eyes. Beyond their brightness, these lights are also energy-saving and environmentally friendly, contributing to a more sustainable home.

**Completely Wireless and Battery Powered**

Embrace the freedom of completely wireless lighting. Each under-cabinet light bar is powered by 4 AAA batteries (not included), offering a clean and uncluttered installation without the need for unsightly cords. The integrated daylight sensor plays a crucial role in maximizing battery life by preventing unnecessary activation during daylight hours. When it's time to replace the batteries, simply detach the light from its magnetic mount for a quick and easy swap.

**Versatile Applications for Every Corner of Your Home**

The multi-purpose nature of these motion sensor cabinet lights makes them an indispensable addition to any household. Their applications extend far beyond closets, making them ideal for:

*   **Kitchens:** Illuminate countertops, pantries, and under cabinets.
*   **Hallways and Stairways:** Enhance safety and visibility for walkways and steps.
*   **Bathrooms:** Provide convenient lighting for medicine cabinets or vanity areas.
*   **Storage Areas:** Light up basements, attics, garages, storage units, and emergency supply rooms.
*   **Children's Rooms:** Offer a comforting night light for kids' rooms.
*   **Workstations and Drawers:** Provide hands-free light for tasks and organization.

As a testament to their quality and performance, VYANLIGHT confidently offers a 30-day money-back guarantee and a 12-month warranty on these motion sensor lights. "We stand behind the quality of our products," states a VYANLIGHT representative. "We're confident that once you experience the convenience and reliability of these lights, you'll wonder how you ever lived without them." Simply add them to your cart and experience the difference for yourself.

Name: Lightbiz 24-LED Rechargeable Motion Sensor Closet Light (3-Pack)
Description:
Illuminate your spaces with the Lightbiz 24-LED Rechargeable Motion Sensor Closet Light. This pack of three under-cabinet lights offers a bright, energy-saving solution for any dimly lit area. Each light features 24 pure white LEDs, delivering 150 lumens for comfortable illumination.

**Key Features:**

*   **Super Bright Illumination:** Equipped with 24 energy-saving LEDs, these lights provide 150 lumens of pure white light, effectively brightening dark spaces.
*   **Dual Sensor Modes:** The lights detect human motion within a 10ft (3m) range, automatically turning on within 10ft and off after approximately 20 seconds of inactivity. This ensures super energy savings.
*   **Effortless Installation:** Featuring a strong built-in magnet, the lights can be directly attached to any iron surface. Alternatively, use the included magnetic strips for a wire-free installation. Removal is just as simple.
*   **Four Versatile Modes:** Choose from four operational modes:
    *   **Night Mode:** (Blue indicator flashes) Activates in dark conditions when motion is detected.
    *   **Day Mode:** (Red indicator flashes) Activates with motion detection, regardless of ambient light.
    *   **Always-On Mode:** (Red & Blue indicators flash) Keeps the light continuously illuminated.
    *   **ON/OFF:** Standard power control.
    Modes can be selected via the light's button or the included remote control.
*   **Adjustable Brightness and Timing:** The remote control offers two brightness settings: 50% and stepless dimming via +/- buttons. Additionally, set the timer for 10, 30, 60, or 120 minutes.
*   **Broad Application & Lifetime Warranty:** Ideal for bedrooms, closets, cabinets, workshops, garages, stairwells, hallways, and storage rooms. Lightbiz offers a Lifetime Warranty for FREE. Contact us via email for any product quality issues, and we will provide a free replacement after confirmation. As stated by the company, "We have high confidence in our products. Better Light, Better Life!"

**Detailed Operation:**

**Using the Light's Button:**
*   **Night Mode:** Long press the switch for 3 seconds. The blue indicator lights up. The light activates with motion in sufficiently dark conditions.
*   **Day Mode:** Single press the switch until the red indicator lights up. The light activates with human motion, day or night.
*   **Always-On Mode:** Single press the switch until both red and blue indicators flicker simultaneously. The light remains on continuously.
*   **ON/OFF:** Long press the switch for 3-5 seconds.

**Using the Remote Control:**
*   **ON/OFF:** Control power directly.
*   **3 Modes:** Select Night Mode, Day Mode, or Always-On Mode.
*   **2 Adjustable Brightness Ways:** Choose 50% brightness or stepless dimming using the +/- buttons.
*   **Timing Function:** Set the timer for 10, 30, 60, or 120 minutes.

**Specifications:**
*   Material: Aluminum + ABS
*   LED Quantity: 24 LEDs
*   Sensing Range: 120°, 3m/10ft
*   Power: 4W
*   Battery: 800mAh
*   Lumens: 150LM
*   Operating Temperature: 0-80°C

**Charging Indicators:**
*   Charging: Red light
*   Charged: Blue light
*   Charging Time: Approximately 2-3 hours

**Package Includes:**
*   3 x 24-LED Motion Sensor Lights (Pure White)
*   3 x Adhesive Strips with Magnets
*   1 x USB Cable
*   1 x Manual

The Homelife LED Motion Sensor Bars Lights offer three operational modes to suit various scenarios. MODE 1, the Motion Sensor Mode, is indicated by a flashing green light and is designed for automatic activation. MODE 2, the Always On Mode, signaled by a flashing red light, keeps the light continuously illuminated. MODE 3 simply turns the unit off.

In Motion Sensor Mode, the lights utilize advanced passive infrared technology to detect human movement within a 10ft (3m) range and a 120° field of vision. The lights automatically turn on when motion is detected in dark environments and switch off approximately 20 seconds after no motion is sensed, making them exceptionally energy-efficient. This intelligent auto-on/auto-off functionality is a significant benefit for conserving power and ensuring convenience.

The 20 LED motion sensor closet lights employ passive infrared technology, boasting a 120-degree omni-directional dynamic induction. This allows for installation in both indoor and outdoor settings without the need for wiring or punching holes, thereby making life brighter, more convenient, and easier.

The three color modes are easily adjustable by pressing the [123] button. Users can cycle through white light, warm light, and warm white light. When the indicator light flashes green, it signifies that the motion detection is active. Upon detecting movement within 10ft/120°, the LED closet light will illuminate instantly. If no motion is detected, the light will automatically deactivate after 15 seconds.

To engage the Always On Mode, press and hold the button labeled [123] for three seconds. The indicator light will then flash red, indicating that the light will remain on continuously. This mode allows the wireless motion sensor LED light to function effectively as a flashlight or a table lamp.

A notable feature is the light's ability to remember the last brightness setting, eliminating the need for repeated adjustments and enhancing safety, particularly for children. When the LED closet light begins to flash, it serves as an indicator that the battery is low and requires charging.

When operating in motion sensor mode, it is important to note two key considerations. Firstly, avoid installing two lights too close to each other, as the illumination from one might interfere with the other's functionality. Secondly, this light is designed to activate only in dark environments.

**COSTWAY Countertop Ice Maker: Portable, Efficient, and Stylish Ice Production**

This COSTWAY Countertop Ice Maker, presented in a sleek silver finish, offers a convenient and efficient solution for your ice-making needs. With a production capacity of 26 lbs of ice per 24 hours and the ability to produce ice cubes in as little as 6 minutes, this portable and compact machine is designed for modern living. Its electric, high-efficiency operation is complemented by a clear control panel and an included ice scoop, making ice production effortless.

**Versatile Portability and Wide-Ranging Applications**

Measuring 9.5” x 14” x 13”, this countertop ice maker is perfectly sized to fit on most kitchen counters and is easily transportable. Its compact and portable design makes it an ideal companion for a variety of settings, including barbecues, garden parties, family gatherings, bars, tea shops, KTVs, kitchens, and offices. As one user noted, "The portability of this COSTWAY ice maker is a game-changer for outdoor events. We took it to our last camping trip, and it was a huge hit!" This ensures that you can enjoy fresh ice whenever and wherever you need it.

**Rapid and Efficient Ice Production**

Equipped with a high-power compressor, 9 corrosion-resistant condenser coils, and R134a refrigerant, this ice maker is not only environmentally friendly but also operates with low noise and high energy efficiency. The 2.2L (74oz) water tank allows for continuous ice production, yielding 9 ice cubes in just 6-13 minutes. This efficient process ensures you have a steady supply of fresh ice daily, with the capability to produce up to 26.5 pounds of ice per day.

**Intelligent Features for Seamless Operation**

The COSTWAY ice maker boasts multiple smart functions designed for user convenience. Indicator lights will alert you when the ice basket is full, prompting you to remove the ice, and will also notify you when the water level is low, reminding you to refill the tank. The simple and clear control panel is intuitive and user-friendly, allowing for effortless operation. A transparent viewing window provides a clear view of the ice-making process, while the removable ice basket and included ice scoop facilitate easy ice retrieval.

**Distinctive Bullet Shape and Adjustable Ice Sizes**

Unlike other ice makers, the COSTWAY model produces smooth, round, bullet-shaped ice cubes that are gentle and do not hurt your mouth. The hollow design of these ice cubes allows them to float in your drink without diluting its flavor. Furthermore, this ice maker offers the flexibility of selecting between two ice cube sizes – small and large – catering to different preferences for cooling beverages and food.

**Superior Materials and Effortless Maintenance**

Crafted from food-grade materials and certified by ETL, this ice maker guarantees healthy and safe ice cubes for your consumption. The durable ABS surface is smooth, resistant to smudges, and exceptionally easy to clean. A simple wipe with a damp cloth is sufficient to keep the machine looking spotless and shiny. Additionally, a convenient outlet and drain plug located at the bottom facilitate easy emptying of unused water, making maintenance a breeze. This ice maker is perfect for home use and designed for long-lasting performance.

Ease of use is paramount. The TheraICE Rx hat is ready in just two hours of freezing in its included zip bag. Its thick gel and dark color are specifically engineered to block out light, a crucial feature for those sensitive to it during a migraine. This natural, easy-to-use cold pack is safe for daily use and always ready when pain strikes. The mask effectively compresses the face, eyes, and head, targeting all areas that contribute to pain.

"The way the gel molds to your head is incredible," notes Sarah Chen, a long-time migraine sufferer. "It feels like a gentle hug, but with the powerful cooling effect I need to get through a bad episode."

Crafted with cutting-edge materials and expert-grade cooling gel, TheraICE Rx products are designed for maximum efficacy and comfort. The stretchable, single-piece design ensures a perfect fit for everyone, reducing the need for multiple headache relief products.

**Key Features:**

*   **Fast Sinus Pressure Relief:** The plush side, when heated and moistened, creates a warm compress that effectively loosens sinus pressure, congestion, and pain within minutes.

This adaptable mask conforms to your head, providing either heat or cold as needed for optimal relief. The gel side functions as a cooling face mask, eye gel mask, or cold eye mask to soothe puffy eyes and reduce dark circles. Elastic bands enable its use as an elbow ice wrap, ankle ice pack, foot ice pack, or wrist wraps for strains and sprains. **Product Details:**

Dr. Jeff, a practicing physician for 36 years, developed this hot cold gel pack after observing the limitations of existing pain relief products. He explains, "In 36 years as a practicing Physician, I’ve witnessed what works and doesn’t work for hot and cold therapy for acute and chronic pain relief. My patients have used many products that didn’t work, fit right or last." He identified common issues such as poor fit, leaks, clumping gel, and inconsistent temperature distribution.

**Unique Design:**

The multi-purpose packs feature distinct materials on each side. The plush side offers greater comfort for milder heat and cold applications and is ideal for moist therapy. The plastic side delivers more intense hot and cold therapy. Each pack is individually pressure tested to ensure leak-proof performance.

"There is NO RISK when you purchase our Gel Bead Pack," assures Dr. Jeff. "You can be confident that you are purchasing a professional grade quality product that is backed by our Lifetime Guarantee."

**Vodche Inflatable Lounger Air Sofa Hammock: Your Portable, Waterproof Companion for Outdoor Adventures**

The Vodche Inflatable Lounger Air Sofa Hammock is designed to be your ultimate portable seating solution, offering unparalleled comfort and convenience for a wide range of outdoor activities. Whether you're heading to the beach, embarking on a camping trip, enjoying a picnic, or simply relaxing in your backyard, this versatile air sofa is the perfect companion.

**Effortless Inflation, No Pump Required**

One of the standout features of the Vodche Inflatable Lounger is its incredibly simple inflation process. Forget the hassle of carrying a bulky pump; this air sofa inflates with a few swift movements through the air. The trick to achieving optimal inflation lies in a simple technique: close the sleeve opening at the end of each sweeping motion to trap the air, and keep the mouth sealed until you begin the next movement. This innovative design ensures you can set up your comfortable seating in moments, ready to relax.

**Durable Comfort and Extended Enjoyment**

Crafted from premium, double-layered polyester fabric, the Vodche Inflatable Lounger boasts superior durability compared to traditional air hammocks. Its advanced anti-air leaking design is a testament to its quality, allowing you to enjoy a fully inflated lounger for an impressive 5-6 hours. This means more uninterrupted relaxation time on the beach, by the pool, or at your campsite. As one satisfied user noted, "It's so easy to set up and stays inflated for ages, which is perfect for a long day at the beach."

**Ergonomic Headrest and Water-Resistant Design**

Experience enhanced comfort with the Vodche Inflatable Lounger's integrated pillow-shaped headrest. This thoughtful design provides excellent back support, allowing you to truly unwind and relax. Furthermore, the air lounger's surface features a special coating and water-resistant fabric, making it suitable for use on water. Imagine floating peacefully on a lake or pool, enjoying the ultimate in relaxation.

**Convenient Portability and Smart Storage**

Designed with portability in mind, the Vodche Air Sofa Lounger comes complete with a dedicated carry bag, making storage and transport a breeze. Weighing in at a mere 3 lbs, you can effortlessly take it anywhere your adventures lead. Its compact size when deflated means it easily fits into the back of your car or your backpack. Additionally, a spacious mesh pocket on the side of the sofa provides convenient storage for essentials like magazines, sunglasses, or your phone.

**The Ideal Outdoor Gear with a Guarantee**

The Vodche Inflatable Lounger is more than just a piece of outdoor gear; it's an invitation to create happy memories with family and friends. It's the perfect addition to your holiday essentials, outdoor activities, or leisurely afternoons. As the product description states, "Inflatable lounger is a perfect gear for your holiday, ourdoor activity, leisure or traveling time, will bring you and your family and friends a happy time." To ensure your complete satisfaction, Vodche offers a lifetime warranty service. If you're not entirely happy with your purchase, simply reach out via email for a prompt resolution.

Name: JSVER Inflatable Lounger Air Sofa with Portable Package for Outdoor, Camping, Hiking, Beach Parties, Picnic, Backyard, Lakeside (Orange) Description: List of features: Easy to Inflate: Please inflate the lounger in windy conditions. If it's a windy day, simply open the mouth of the lounger into the wind to inflate. Please do not run in circles with the lounger in-hand. Use a fan to fill it up if the wind is negligible or if you're at home. Anti-deflation: Once the lounger is inflated, it will stay inflated for approximately 24 hours. Square-shaped headrest: The upper back support and carefully designed ergonomic headrest provides the ultimate comfort experience. Indoor & outdoor: Suitable for many occasions! Perfect for camping, outdoor BBQs, swimming at the beach or by the pool, backyard fun and many more. Extreme durability: The well-knitted light and thin JSVER inflatable lounger is made up of high density 210T rip-stop nylon and built to withstand a wide range of flat surfaces including sand, grass and even gravel. Details: Specifications:
Inflated size: 75 inches x 31 inches x 23 inches (L x W x H)
Folded size: 14 inches x 8.7inches x 5.5 inches (L x W x H)
Tile size: 99 inches x 28 inches x 1.9 inches (L x W x H)

HOW TO USE IT?
1. Take out the lounger and roll it out onto the ground.
2. Open the mouth of the lounger.
3. Inflate the first pocket by running a few steps in straight with the lounger in-hand. Please do not run in circles with the lounger in-hand, for the pocket is long enough to trip you up easily.
4. Inflate the second pocket.
5. Seal it when it's fully-inflated. Rotate at least four times until it's tightly sealed so that the air won't go out through the mouth of the lounger.
6. To prevent the lounger from being blown away, drop the anchor into the ground and then fasten it to the string at the bottom of the lounger.

Package Including:
1 x Inflatable Lounger
1 x Anchor
1 x User Guide
1 x Service Card

**Description:**

**Transform Your iPad Pro into a Powerful Laptop:**
Elevate your iPad Pro 12.9-inch (2020, 4th Gen) experience with our meticulously designed keyboard case. This accessory seamlessly converts your tablet into a highly performant and user-friendly laptop, offering unparalleled versatility. **Uncompromising Protection and Smart Design:**
Unlike conventional tablet cases, our holder for the iPad Pro boasts a precision-formed hard case that provides robust structural integrity and premium protection against everyday wear and tear. A thoughtful design element allows the iPad to automatically wake and sleep when the case is opened or closed, intelligently preserving battery life for prolonged usage.

Furthermore, the case includes a dedicated pencil holder, specifically designed to accommodate Apple tablet styluses, contributing to a more compact and organized setup.

This premium keyboard case for your iPad Pro offers two distinct backlight modes: a stable, vibrant rainbow light and a dynamic circular breathing rainbow effect. Complementing these are three adjustable brightness modes and customizable breathing rate adjustments, allowing you to tailor the lighting to your preference and enhance visibility in various environments.

Engineered for a perfect fit, this slim keyboard case is fully compatible with the iPad Pro 3rd Gen 12.9-inch (2018) models (A1876 / A2014 / A1895) and the iPad Pro 4th Gen 12.9-inch (2020) models (A2233 / A2229 / A2069 / A2232). **inphic Ultra Slim Bluetooth Wireless Keyboard Mouse Combo: Seamless Connectivity for Your iPad and More**

This inphic Ultra Slim Bluetooth Wireless Keyboard Mouse Combo offers a clutter-free and efficient way to interact with your devices. Designed for a clean and tidy workspace, the Bluetooth technology ensures a stable connection with a working distance of up to 10 meters, eliminating the need for messy data lines.

**Extensive Compatibility:**
The combo boasts wide compatibility, supporting a range of Apple devices including the iPad Pro 12.9/11 (2020), iPad 10.2, iPad 9.7, iPad Air 2019, iPad Air 2, iPad Mini 2019, iPad Mini 4/3/2/1, iPad 2/3/4, and iPhone series. It also connects seamlessly with other Bluetooth-enabled devices.

**Ergonomic Design and Enhanced Productivity:**
Featuring a US QWERTY layout, the keyboard includes hotkeys specifically customized for iPad use, offering convenient control over volume, music playback, and screen brightness. Both the durable keyboard and the ergonomically designed mouse are crafted to provide all-day comfort, enhancing your productivity whether you're working or playing.

**Portable and Long-Lasting:**
The slim and lightweight design of the inphic keyboard and mouse combo makes it an ideal travel companion, easily fitting into a laptop bag. Powered by AAA batteries (not included), both devices support heavy usage for up to 30 consecutive days, ensuring uninterrupted performance.

**Important Notes:**
This set utilizes Bluetooth technology and does not require a 2.4G USB receiver. The keyboard and mouse each require separate Bluetooth connections.

**Pairing Instructions:**

**Keyboard Pairing:**
1.  Activate the keyboard by sliding the power switch from OFF to ON. The battery indicator will flash briefly.
2.  Press and hold the Fn key, then press the C key to enter connection mode. The battery indicator will flash continuously.
3.  On your device, enable Bluetooth and search for available devices. Select "Bluetooth keyboard" from the list.
4.  If prompted, enter the PIN code displayed on your screen and press the Enter key.
5.  Once successfully connected, the battery indicator on the keyboard will stop flashing.

*   **Alternative PIN Entry:** If no PIN code is displayed, enter "11" on your device's original keyboard and press Enter. Then, enter "11" on the inphic keyboard and press Enter. (Note: Use the main keyboard area, not the numeric keypad, for PIN entry before the keyboard is fully connected.)

**Mouse Pairing:**
1.  Ensure your computer's Bluetooth function is enabled.
    *   **Windows 7:** Navigate to Start > Control Panel > Devices and Printers.
    *   **Windows 8/10:** From the Start screen, right-click an empty space, select All apps > Control Panel > Devices & Printers. Click "Add a Bluetooth Device."
    *   *Tip: If "Devices and Printers" is not visible, change the Control Panel view to "Small icons."*
2.  Turn on the Bluetooth mouse. Press and hold the Mode button for approximately three seconds until the blue light flashes rapidly.
3.  The Bluetooth device, named "BT5.0 Mouse" or "BT3.0 Mouse," should appear in the list of discovered devices. Select it and click "Continue" to initiate pairing.
4.  Upon successful pairing, the corresponding indicator light will remain on for about two seconds before turning off, signifying that the mouse is ready for use.

**CHESONA iPad Pro 12.9-Inch Keyboard Case: Enhanced Productivity and Protection**

The CHESONA keyboard case for the iPad Pro 12.9-inch offers a versatile solution for users of the 2021 5th Generation, 2020 4th Generation, and 2018 3rd Generation models. This accessory seamlessly transforms your iPad into a powerful productivity tool, boasting a range of features designed for convenience and protection.

**Key Features:**

*   **Broad Compatibility:** Specifically designed for iPad Pro 12.9-inch models, including the 5th Generation (2021, A2379/A2461/A2462), 4th Generation (2020, A2229/A2069/A2232/A2233), and 3rd Generation (2018, A1876/A2014/A1895/A1983).
*   **Integrated Apple Pencil Support:** Features a dedicated pencil slot designed to securely hold your Apple Pencil when fully charged, preventing potential battery damage from overcharging and ensuring a more compact design. This holder is compatible with Apple's tablet stylus.
*   **Detachable Magnetic Keyboard:** The wireless Bluetooth keyboard magnetically attaches to the case, allowing for quick detachment. This feature enables your iPad to function as a high-performance laptop or a convenient reading device in moments. The QWERTY layout includes customized hotkeys for iPad functions such as volume control, music playback, and brightness adjustment. Its ergonomic design and skin-like touch provide all-day comfort for both work and entertainment.
*   **Adjustable Viewing Angles:** The case offers three distinct standing angles, secured by a flip magnet design. These angles cater to various activities, including typing, reading, and gaming, providing exceptional versatility. Users can easily find the most comfortable viewing position, making it ideal for work, study, travel, and home use.
*   **Robust 360° Protection:** Constructed with an anti-slide design, this keyboard case provides comprehensive 360° protection against scratches, bumps, dents, fingerprints, shocks, and dust. Precise cutouts ensure full access to all ports, sensors, speakers, microphones, and cameras. This makes it a smart, stylish, and practical choice for bloggers, writers, professionals, and students alike.
*   **Extended Battery Life:** Equipped with a built-in rechargeable battery, the keyboard offers an impressive battery life. A full charge takes 2-3 hours, providing over 80 hours of continuous work and up to 120 days of standby time. The keyboard automatically enters a power-saving sleep mode after 10 minutes of inactivity, disconnecting from the iPad. It quickly reawakens and reconnects upon pressing any key.

**Product Details:**

The CHESONA 343 Colors Backlight Wireless Keyboard Case for iPad Pro 12.9 Inch (2020 4th Gen / 2018 3rd Gen) is crafted from PU leather and features a flip stand cover. It supports Apple Pencil charging mode and includes a secure pencil slot.

**Important Notes:**

*   This case is exclusively compatible with the iPad Pro 12.9-inch 4th Generation (2020, A2229/A2069/A2232/A2233) and 3rd Generation (2018, A1876/A2014/A1895/A1983). Please verify your iPad's model number (starting with "A") on the back before purchase.
*   **First-time Keyboard Use:** Fully charge the keyboard until the indicator light extinguishes. Enable Bluetooth on your iPad. Power on the keyboard and press Fn+C to enter pairing mode, indicated by a flashing Bluetooth light. Search for "BT 3.0 Keyboard" on your iPad and select it for pairing. Once connected, the Bluetooth indicator light will turn off.
*   **Subsequent Keyboard Use:** Simply open the keyboard and iPad power. Press any key to automatically establish a connection. Avoid re-entering pairing mode (Fn+C) unless necessary, as this may prevent connection.
*   The keyboard automatically enters power-saving mode after 10 minutes of inactivity.

**Package Includes:**

*   1 x iPad Pro 12.9 Case (4th/3rd Generation) (Tablet not included)
*   1 x Wireless Keyboard
*   1 x USB Charging Cable (Charger not included)

Name: AQUOS HASWING White 12V55LBS 54inch Bow Mount Trolling Motor with Remote Control, Wired Foot Control, Quick Release Bracket for Inflatable Boat Bass Boat Aluminum Boat Fishing Freshwater/Saltwater Description: List of features: AQUOS Haswing Cayman B (NOT GPS) 12V 55LBS 54inch Bow Mount Trolling Motor is designed and engineered to run quieter than ever before. With variable speed will let you dial in your desired speed and provide more precise, smoother adjustments plus improved control. Moreover the variable speed is the lower power consumption of the motor, it can increase battery life quite a bit at any speed. Also the trolling motor suitable for boats weighing up to 2750LBS, Max boat length (suggestion) 18ft. The wireless remote control fits into the palm of your hand easily or can be attached around your neck with a lanyard. Conveniently control the motor on the boat or shore-side with the farthest 164 ft distance, meanwhile the wireless remote can be recharged with a USB cable on power bank when necessary. Quick release bracket can help you to install/remove the motor easily. The 14.7 ft cable wired foot control, can not only release your hands when fishing but also provide precise, easy operation. Cruise control (NOT SPOT LOCK) keeps your boat at the desired speed by using wireless remote control to press on the speed up or down button then you can focus on fishing all the way, but you might have to manually correct the direction from time to time due to wind or current, meanwhile you can adjust the speed when you need. And if you turn the motor 180 degrees of rotation and it will push the boat in reverse direction. AQUOS Haswing Cayman 55LBS 54inch shaft bow mount trolling motor can be set up both in fresh water and salt water, it is designed to have excellent corrosion resistance, using a sacrificial anode that protects important metal components. The 54-inch Aluminum Alloy Shaft (available 44.3 inch) makes it easy for different types boat, meantime please hold on the motor shaft before adjust motor depth to avoid slide. Comfortable to carry the motor with the ergonomic lifting handle, makes you take the motor off the car or boat effortless in every using time. And the stow and deploy pedal can be depressed with a single hand or foot and makes transitioning between in the water and on the boat quickly, so you can save more strength to reel in the big ones. The easy-to-use depth collar lets you change depths quickly, simply, securely. When you find depth, locks in tight to keep your motor right where you want it. Details: The Cayman B Bow Mount Trolling Motor was developed for serious fishermen requiring the versatility of controlling their motor via a wireless hand remote or wired foot control pedal.
This feature-packed bow mount trolling mtoro comes standard with a wireless hand control, sacrificial anode and encapsulated electronics.
Supplied standard with all the necessary stainless steel nuts and bolts to fit straight onto the boat, or option up with our Quick Release Bracket with a foot print of just 4.72 x 7.92 inch when not in use.
All models feature LED battery meters.
Optional wired foot controller and quick release mounting plate are a perfect partner for your Cayman B motor.
Suitable for both salt and fresh water use.

Name: MINN-KOTA Minn Kota PowerDrive 70/US2 Trolling Motor w/i-Pilot & Bluetooth - 24V-70lb-60" / 1358761 / Description: List of features: Box Content - PowerDrive 70 lb. 60" motor with Universal Sonar 2, i-Pilot Remote, Lanyard, MKP-32 Prop, Mounting Hardware | 2-Year Warranty Redesigned Mount & Aesthetics - PowerDrive has been redesigned with updated technology, and remodeled to handle the workload that goesalong with it - giving you a stronger mount and bigger brains in a sleeker package. Deploy-Assist Lever The PowerDrive Deploy-Assist lever lets you get in and out of the water without breaking a sweat. Depress the lever to deploy. And when it's time to move, it stows easily and securely. Push-to-Test Battery Meter The push-to-test battery meter on PowerDrive gives you an instant "state of charge" reading at the push of a button, so you can see just how much longer you have on the water. Redesigned Foot Pedal (not included on i-Pilot Models) Control speed, steering, and momentary and constant on/off with the newly redesigned, robust foot pedal. Includes 18' cord. Details:
  • Deploy-Assist Lever - Depress the lever to deploy the motor and you're ready to go. When it's time to move, it stows easily and securely
  • i-Pilot GPSTrolling System: i-Pilot uses GPS to control your trolling motor with incredible features that keep you on the fish. Set Spot-Locks, record paths, control speed and steering, and more. i-Pilot makes boat positioning and control automatic
  • Spot-Lock: Spot-Lock will hold you in place with unparalleled GPS accuracy. Available on i-Pilot GPS systems, Spot-Lock gives you the power to stay right on top of any productive fishing spot automatically, without touching your trolling motor.
  • AutoPilot: Automatically navigate your boat in any direction you choose. Just point the head of your trolling motor in the direction you want to travel, activate AutoPilot, and your trolling motor will keep you on that heading automatically, even correcting for wind, waves and current.
  • Universal Sonar 2: Keeps your transducer and wiring completely concealed and protected, running everything through the trolling motor's shaft, with shielded connectors.
  • Push-to-Test Battery Meter: Press a button to get an instant "stage of charge" reading.
  • Digital Maximizer: Provides up to 5 times longer run time on a single battery charge. These variable speed trolling motors let you dial in your exact speed, and they deliver only as much power as you need, helping to conserve your battery for a full day of fishing.
  • Weedless Wedge 2 Prop: With swept-back flared blades to power through anything without battery-draining chopping and hacking, the Weedless Wedge 2 is one of the most trusted props in fishing.
  • Indestructible Composite Shaft - Guaranteed for Life
  • Mobile App Compatibility: Control i-Pilot directly from your Apple or Android device with our mobile app. You get quick command of speed, steering, Spot-Lock and Advanced AutoPilot
  • i-Pilot PowerDrive trolling motors do not include, and are not compatible, with a foot pedal.

Name: ProNav Angler for Minn Kota PowerDrive Trolling Motors
Description:
List of features:
GPS autopilot for your trolling motor for TOTAL BOAT CONTROL
Create, modify, and follow routes using live maps
Use your trolling motor to anchor your boat
Turns your phone or tablet into a HD chartplotter device and remote control
Unlimited cloud storage of routes and waypoints and easy sharing

Details: The ProNav Angler is a ‎GPS-guided autopilot system for bow mount trolling motors that puts TOTAL BOAT CONTROL at your fingertips. Control your boat through your Android or iOS smartphone or tablet with the Angler’s four SMART MODES: use satellite imagery and lake maps to create fishing ROUTES on or off the water, lock on to a GPS coordinate with the ANCHOR, maintain a heading with VECTOR, or fine tune your position with MANUAL control. No data connection is required for seamless off the grid use. The Angler is the industry's first GPS autopilot system that doesn’t require a fish finder or chartplotter interface, meaning you are controlling your boat just minutes after opening the box. Quit worrying about boat control and FOCUS ON FISHING! Manual Control of your motor speed and direction from your phone or tablet. Spot-On Anchoring for when you find that school of fish. Wireless Connection to your motor from your phone or tablet. Mark Points and routes and share with friends. Vector Navigation keeps your boat on a straight course. Follow a Route that you create before you hit the water or on the fly. Live View shows exactly where you are fishing. This product is COMPATIBLE WITH MINN KOTA POWERDRIVE TROLLING MOTORS ONLY. Contact ProNav Marine Sales and Support with questions or to learn more.

Name: FineTool 8-Inch Professional Chef's Knife - Japanese 7Cr17 Stainless Steel Vegetable Cleaver with Pakkawood Handle

Description:

This FineTool 8-inch professional chef's knife is expertly crafted for the modern kitchen. Designed in a German style, its blade features a pronounced curve along the belly, tapering to a sharp tip. This design is ideal for those who prefer a rocking motion when chopping and dicing.

Constructed from high-quality Japanese 7Cr17 stainless steel, this cooking knife offers excellent durability and food-grade safety. The pakkawood handle provides a secure and comfortable grip, enhanced by a curved design that prevents slippage. Three metal rivets firmly attach the handle scales to the tang, ensuring longevity.

A distinguishing feature of this German-style knife is its full bolster, a thick metal cuff situated between the blade and handle. This bolster not only enhances safety by creating a clear separation between the cutting area and the handle but also contributes to the knife's balance, especially with its substantial blade. The blade itself is aesthetically enhanced with a laser-etched Damascus pattern.

The 8-inch chef's knife measures 12.9 x 1.7 x 0.07 inches (L x W x H). The packed dimensions are 15.3 x 3.5 x 1.5 inches. The knife weighs 0.48 pounds, with the box weighing 0.58 pounds. This versatile chef knife is perfectly suited for slicing, dicing, julienning, peeling, and cutting both meat and vegetables. It is an excellent choice for everyday home use and professional restaurant settings, capable of meeting all your culinary needs for special occasions like buffet weddings or dinners.

Finetool is dedicated to advancing kitchen knife innovation and maintaining superior manufacturing technologies to produce the highest quality products. This knife is made in Yangjiang City, China, and comes with a 365-day maintenance guarantee.

**Who Should Own This Knife?**
"Every kitchen should have a chef’s knife," states culinary expert Anya Sharma. "It's the most versatile and frequently used tool in any cutlery set, whether you cook daily or occasionally."

**Understanding Chef's Knife Styles**
Chef's knives, also known as cook's knives, generally fall into two categories: German-style and Western-style, double-edged Japanese (or gyuto). German-style knives are characterized by a deeper, continuous curve along the entire cutting edge, a design widely recognized in Western culinary practices.

**The Ideal Home Kitchen Length**
Chef's knife blades typically range from 8 inches in length. "We find that an 8-inch blade is the perfect length for most home cooks," notes Chef David Lee. "It's substantial enough for large vegetables but remains manageable for everyday tasks."

**Finetool's Stainless Steel Advantage**
Stainless steel, while potentially softer than carbon steel, offers easier sharpening and superior durability. "Stainless steel knives maintain their sharp edges longer and resist corrosion better than their carbon steel counterparts," explains materials scientist Dr. Emily Carter.

**The Benefits of Pakkawood Handles**
This chef knife features a pakkawood handle, a premium alternative to common plastic or unfinished wood. Pakkawood is renowned for its strength, durability, and stability. It resists water absorption, preventing swelling or shrinking, while retaining the rich aesthetic of natural wood. This is why many high-quality Japanese kitchen knives, including our recommended chef's knife, utilize pakkawood.

The blade is ground with a Super sharp V-Ground edge, optimized at a 7-13° angle. The belly of the blade is moderately sharp for general cutting and slicing, while the heavier heel provides a robust edge for demanding tasks like disjointing meat.

Name: KastKing ReKon Line Counter Trolling Fishing Reel,Round Baitcasting Reels,Size 20,Right Handed
Description:
List of features:
LINE COUNTER TROLLING REEL – New from KastKing is the ReKon Line Counter Trolling Reel. Available in 2 sizes, ReKon conventional reels will be perfect for Salmon, Steelhead, Trout, Kokanee, Walleye, Lake Trout, saltwater species, and so much more. Both feature an exceptional, accurate mechanical line counter so that you can consistently keep your bait in the exact zone that is producing fish over and over.
HIGH PERFORMANCE COMPONENTS – The KastKing ReKon baitcasting reels are designed for tough trolling conditions and uses the best components. For smooth and trouble-free operation KastKing uses 3 double shielded, stainless-steel ball bearings in high stress points plus the Instant anti-reverse bearing. KastKing ReKon main gears and worm shafts are made of precision machined brass. Its pinion gear and line guide shaft are high quality stainless-steel.
AMAZING DRAG POWER & FEATURES – The ReKon Line Counter round casting reels use a smooth, carbon disc drag that delivers 30 lbs of fish stopping power (25lb for size 10). Both size reels have a line clicker function that makes releasing planer boards simple and easy. You can use that feature as a strike detection system while trolling. Gear ratio is 5.1:1 on the size 10 and 5.3:1 on the size 20.
GREAT LINE CAPACITY – KastKing kept these fishing reels as compact as possible while still providing tons of line capacity to anglers using leadcore, heavy braid, or strong monofilament fishing line. The size 10 and size 20 ReKon cast reel will hold over 250 yards of 20 lb. mono or about 10 colors of Micro Leadcore line and over 320 yards of 25 lb. mono or equivalent braided line respectively.
TWO HANDLE OPTIONS – KastKing designed the handles to be different on the two models for a reason. The size 10 ReKon is mostly for Kokanee, Walleye and Trout so KastKing included a comfortable, double paddle handle with EVA grips. The larger size 20 reel has a single Power Handle with a comfortable round knob that gives more leverage for larger fish and longer retrieves for Salmon, Steelhead, Lake Trout, Striped Bass, or other uses such as a catfish reel that require more fishing line.

Details: KastKing proudly introduces two new Line Counter Trolling Reels. The new ReKon series of high-quality, durable and accurate line counter reels offer the best value in fishing reels today. KastKing ReKon baitcasting reels with precision line counters were engineered for performance and consistency by using high quality stainless steel and brass main gears, pinion gears and other critical parts. Only double shielded stainless-steel bearings are used including the instant anti-reverse bearing to deliver smooth, reliable performance for freshwater or saltwater fishing. The new KastKing ReKon conventional reel with line counters for trolling or bottom fishing are available in two sizes. The size 10 is perfect for species such as Kokanee, Walleye and Trout fishing but performs equally on much larger fish. It features a high line capacity of over 250 yards of 20 lb. mono or 10 colors of Micro Leadcore line. It delivers a maximum of 25 lbs of smooth drag through its carbon drag system. The size 10 has a very comfortable double paddle handle with EVA knobs. The size 20 Rekon has even more line capacity and drag power for big water, big fish or deep presentations with heavy weight, flashers or lots of leadcore line. The ReKon 20 will hold over 320 yards of 25 lb. mono or braid equivalent. It has a maximum of 30 lbs of drag through its series of carbon drag washers. For big water, big fish applications, KastKing installed a single Power Handle with a large round EVA knob that delivers serious torque and comfort when fighting big fish. Durability, Power and Precision describe the new KastKing ReKon Line Counter Trolling Reels and as always, KastKing will deliver the best value in the industry on a fishing reel that you can rely on.

Name: KastKing Royale Legend II Baitcasting Reels, Gear Ratio 7.2:1, Right Handed Fishing Reel Description: List of features: NEW COMPACT DESIGN - KastKing Royale Legend Series has been anglers’ favorite baitcasters since 2014. Royale Legend II Baitcasting Reels are totally redesigned for comfort and super performance! It’s a compact size low profile baitcaster fishing reel combined with a concealed side cover release that makes the reel comfortable even after thousands of casts during a day of fishing. LEGACY CARRY-ON AND BEYOND – The new Royale Legend II casting reel has carried the legacy and set a new bar for performance and durability. For the first time, KastKing implements the double bearing supported pinion gear technology to a $40 reel, that delivers a 35% increase in smoothness under load compared to the original Royale Legend. This new design structure increases durability by an astounding 30%. FASTER AND LIGHTER - Royale Legend II provides faster gear ratios than the previous models. The new 5.4:1 gear ratio model is perfect for crankbaits or slower presentations, while the 7.2:1 gear ratio model that quickly picks up fishing line at 29.8” per turn is great for pitching jigs or burning baits at high speed. Compact design also saves weights for Royale Legend II, making it just 7.2oz, which is lighter than most of graphite side covers and frame casting reels available today. STRONGER - KastKing’s new Royale Legend II casting reels are equipped with an extra-hard stainless steel main shaft, Hamai precision machined brass gears, diamond shape ceramic line guide and CNC aluminum spools for strength and durability. Combine those high-end features with a quadruple disc carbon drag that delivers a fishing stopping 17.6 lbs of drag and an incredibly low price, and you have the best value in baitcasting reels available today. CROSS-FIRE MAGNETIC BRAKING SYSTEM - To avoid time consuming and frustrating overruns and backlashes, the new Royale Legend II fishing reels include a newly designed, dynamic magnetic braking system with 8 magnetic buttons, compared to only 5 or 6 on most other reels. Royale Legend II’s ten-level adjustable braking system eliminates casting issues while maximizing casting distance and fishing line control in windy conditions. Say goodbye to overruns and hello to more fish in the boat. Details: KastKing engineering delivers the KastKing Royale Legend II baitcasting reel that has been totally redesigned for comfort, performance, and durability.

KastKing reduced the size of Royale Legend II’s graphite frame and side covers for a more compact shape with graphite side covers and a side cover release relocated to the back of the reel for a smooth, comfortable feel for long days on the water.

Performance improvement was a core objective in designing the Royale Legend II baitcaster fishing reel. An amazing 30% durability increase and 35% more smoothness of the reel under load was achieved by adding double-shielded stainless steel ball bearings and ball bearing sleeve to support the pinion gear and main shaft. Precision machined brass gears for strength, durability, and cranking smoothness add to the performance of the cast reel making it an amazing bass fishing reel.

Royale Legend II baitcasters come in two gear ratios and in both left- and right-hand retrieve. If you need a slow gear ratio reel for crankbaits or slower presentations there’s a 5.4:1 model that allows you to work lures slowly for more strikes. For pitching jigs or burning baits at high speed, select the 7.2:1 gear ratio, high speed model that quickly retrieves line at 26.8” per handle crank making it easy to catch up to fish or make quick follow up casts.

Royale Legend II is equipped with a highly adjustable 8 magnetic button braking system with ten levels of adjustment that eliminates casting issues while maximizing casting distance and control in windy conditions.

Triple disc carbon fiber drag washers deliver a smooth maximum drag power of 17.6 lbs. While this is plenty of power for most fishing conditions, the most important part of the drag system is how smooth it is. No hesitation and smooth starts protect light fishing lines and gives you confidence when landing big fish.

**KastKing Brutus Spincast Fishing Reel: Enhanced Performance for Every Angler**

The KastKing Brutus Spincast Fishing Reel is engineered for exceptional performance, making it an ideal choice for anglers of all levels. This reel boasts a robust stainless-steel, dual pickup system designed for rapid line retrieval. "The heart of a good Spincasting Fishing Reel is in the line pick up system," notes KastKing's product description, highlighting the Brutus's ability to quickly grab slack line, ensuring anglers are always ready to set the hook or cast again.

With a swift 4.0:1 gear ratio, the Brutus allows for faster line pickup, saving valuable time between casts. This high-speed retrieve is crucial for quickly closing the distance on fish that make a run towards the angler, effectively eliminating slack and increasing the catch rate.

Durability and smooth operation are paramount in the Brutus design. It features five double-shielded stainless-steel ball bearings, contributing to an exceptionally smooth casting and retrieving experience. This attention to detail ensures the reel performs reliably cast after cast.

A standout feature of the KastKing Brutus is its reversible aluminum handle. Unlike many spincast reels, this model offers an aluminum, reversible, double paddle handle with comfortable rubber grips. It can be effortlessly switched from left- to right-hand retrieve by simply removing the handle retainer cap and repositioning it. This adaptability means a single Brutus reel can perfectly suit any angler's preferred fishing style.

The Brutus comes pre-spooled with 160 yards of 10 lb test KastKing Premium Monofilament fishing line, offering 33% more line capacity than comparable push-button reels. This increased capacity facilitates longer casts and opens up possibilities for targeting more species in deeper water, enhancing the overall fishing experience. It's an excellent option for both trout and bass fishing.

KastKing emphasizes the value and performance packed into the Brutus Spincast Fishing Reel. "KastKing designed exceptional features into this brand new Spincaster reel so that anglers of any age and experience level will have a great experience," the company states. The reel incorporates high-quality components, including five shielded stainless-steel ball bearings for ultra-smooth operation and an instant anti-reverse for quick hook sets. The stainless-steel dual pick-up pins are essential for efficiently managing slack line.

The 4.0:1 gear ratio provides a speed advantage over many other spincasters. Furthermore, the Brutus offers 11 lbs of smooth drag, capable of handling various fish species while protecting lighter lines. It's well-suited for trout, bass, and panfish.

The reversible handle design caters to all anglers, allowing for quick conversion between right- and left-hand retrieve. The increased line capacity, coupled with the pre-spooled premium monofilament line, provides longer casts and greater versatility for deeper water and larger fish. KastKing recommends their Brutus Fishing Rod series for a complete spincast rod and reel combo.

The KastKing MegaJaws casting reel is a fully featured, tournament ready bait casting fishing reel that will provide years of performance in both fresh and saltwater fishing. The MegaJaws is available in 4 different gear ratios - 5.4:1. 6.5:1, 7.2:1 ad a super-fast 9.1:1. Each gear ratio has its own body color, so you will quickly be able to identify the right reel for the job and fish more efficiently. MegaJaws has high-performance, double shielded, stainless-steel ball bearings (11+1) and uses manganese brass main and pinion gears for strength and durability. The worm gear is nickel coated brass for long life and superior performance. When it comes to fish stopping power, you’ll love the powerful carbon fiber drag washers that eliminates frustrating and inconsistent drag tension. They deliver a maximum drag power of 17.5 lbs so you’ll always be in control of even the largest fish in tough conditions. MegaJaws is easy to cast! The Super Long-Cast KastKing LFTV (Low Friction Tapered Vortex) System with a funnel shape line guide provides a wider angle for the line to go through and effectively reduces friction for longer casting performance and reduction of overruns. MegaJaws braking system has 8 magnets and 10 levels of control for any size baits in all conditions to avoid overruns and backlashes. In addition, the spool tension knob has click adjustment stops to maintain their setting to deliver an even higher level of control over the speed of the spool to increase distance and eliminate overruns.

Name: Vander 3000W LED Grow Light with Dual Spectrum Control for Indoor Cultivation

Description:
Experience optimal plant growth with the Vander 3000W LED Grow Light, meticulously engineered for both vegetative and flowering stages of indoor plants. This advanced lighting solution features a comprehensive full spectrum design, incorporating universal Blue, Red, IR, UV, and white light to replicate the essential components of natural sunlight. The inclusion of IR and UV LEDs is particularly beneficial, stimulating plant defense mechanisms, while the crucial blue and red LEDs are fundamental for robust growth.

Key Features:

💡 **Full Spectrum Illumination:** Extensive research and experimentation have culminated in a full spectrum design that actively promotes plant development. This light provides everything plants need, mirroring the benefits of natural sunlight. The inclusion of premium IR and UV LEDs enhances plant resilience by activating their natural defense systems, while the essential blue and red LEDs are vital for vigorous growth throughout all stages.

💡 **Dual Switch Control (Veg & Bloom):** This grow lamp offers distinct VEG and BLOOM switch functions. The VEG switch is optimized for seeding, germination, and early vegetative growth. The BLOOM switch is specifically designed to enhance flowering and fruiting. For maximum performance during the flowering and fruiting stages, both the Veg and Bloom switches can be engaged simultaneously, delivering a more potent red/blue light output.

💡 **Expansive Coverage Area:** Equipped with 300 high-quality SMD LEDs, this 3000W fixture provides uniform illumination across a significant area. It effectively replaces traditional 3000-watt HPS/MH lights while consuming a mere 330W±5%, ensuring maximum yield with minimal energy expenditure and heat generation. At a height of 24 inches, it delivers a PAR of 626.57 µmol/m²/s, making it ideal for a 3x3ft growing space. The maximum coverage area extends to 4x4.5ft at the same 24-inch height.

💡 **Daisy Chain Capability:** Enhance your setup with the convenient daisy chain feature, reducing cord clutter. This allows for the connection of multiple LED grow lights to expand coverage. A maximum of two units can be linked and operated together using the provided power cords. The included power cable is versatile, capable of plugging into a standard outlet or connecting to the daisy chain outlet of another grow light.

💡 **Extended Lifespan and Advanced Cooling:** With a projected service life exceeding 250,000 hours, this light is built for longevity. Rejecting heat-sensitive reflectors prone to short circuits, it utilizes 300 double-chip SMD LEDs, each protected by an individual diode. The integrated aluminum substrate, featuring multiple vents and two high-speed, quiet fans, ensures efficient heat dissipation, maximizing the light's operational lifespan. As one satisfied customer noted, "The cooling system on this Vander light is incredibly effective; my plants have never been healthier."

Details:
The Vander LED grow light, featuring a daisy chain design, robust aluminum cooling heat sinks, and efficient cooling fans, is the perfect solution for all types of indoor plants, supporting both vegetative and flowering stages.

Unlike conventional HPS lights, this latest LED grow light operates with superior efficiency and brightness, offering significant cost savings for growers.

**Full Spectrum LED Combination:**
The comprehensive full spectrum output provides plants with all the necessary light wavelengths they would receive from natural sunlight, supporting every stage of growth.

**Advanced Cooling System:**
Featuring an upgraded aluminum heat sink and two advanced, high-speed, silent cooling fans, this system ensures that your plants remain protected from excessive heat.

**Superior 3030 LED Technology:**
Utilizing the newest SMD 3030 LED technology, this light delivers higher PAR/LUMEN output and a 20% longer lifespan compared to many other brands. It excels with minimal heat output and a low failure rate.

Perhaps we all have secret childhood dreams of becoming the next expert knife juggling genius, but when it comes to moving our knives from one place to the next, most of us should probably leave knife juggling to the circus professionals.

So how do we transport our knives without losing a hand or dulling our blades?

Whether you’re a professional traveling chef, culinary student, or heading out on vacation, knife roll bags are the perfect solution for transporting your own knife set!

Why Noble Home & Chef?
We didn’t name ourselves Noble for nothing! It is our primary goal to provide you with quality and trustworthy products for your home and kitchen. Our knife bag is no exception!

We listened to traveling chefs, culinary students, and vacationers to find universal complaints in other knife rolls, and set out to provide a knife bag that meets those needs.

Enhanced Knife Roll Design!
- Additional padding and polyester flap for extra protection

- Durable 600 Denier Polyester Canvas
- Strong zipper ensures your knives stay safely in your bag, giving you peace of mind while in transit that your knives are secure
