**Vilcome USB-C to HDMI/VGA Adapter: Dual Monitor Connectivity for Enhanced Productivity**

The Vilcome 2-in-1 USB-C to HDMI/VGA adapter offers a versatile solution for expanding your display capabilities. This compact adapter allows you to connect your USB-C enabled laptop or PC to external monitors, projectors, or TVs, supporting both extended and mirrored display modes.

**Key Features:**

*   **Simultaneous Dual Monitor Setup:** This adapter is engineered to extend or mirror your laptop's screen to two external displays simultaneously via HDMI and VGA ports. This dual-monitor capability is ideal for multitasking, presentations, or enjoying immersive entertainment on a larger screen. As one user noted, "The ability to have two separate displays running at once has dramatically improved my workflow."

*   **High-Resolution Output:** The HDMI port delivers stunning 4K Ultra HD resolution at 3840×2160@30Hz, while the VGA port supports Full HD 1080P@60Hz. When both ports are utilized concurrently, the maximum resolution for each display is capped at 1920 x 1080P@60Hz. It's important to note that in extend mode, when both HDMI and VGA are active, both monitors will display the same content.

*   **Extensive Compatibility:** Designed for USB-C devices featuring DisplayPort Alternate Mode (DP Alt Mode), this adapter boasts wide compatibility. It works seamlessly with popular models such as the MacBook Pro (2019/2018/2017/2016), MacBook Air 2018, iMac 2018, iPad Pro 2018, Chromebook Pixel, Dell XPS 13/15, and many more. A spokesperson for Vilcome stated, "We've prioritized broad compatibility to ensure our users can integrate this adapter into their existing setups with ease." For optimal performance, ensure your host device supports DP Alt Mode.

*   **Plug-and-Play Simplicity:** Featuring plug-and-play technology, this USB-C adapter requires no additional software or drivers. Simply connect the adapter to your USB-C port and then connect your HDMI and VGA cables to your displays for an instant setup. This ease of use makes it an ideal solution for users seeking a straightforward connection to HDMI or VGA-equipped displays, including those compatible with Thunderbolt 3.

**Detailed Specifications:**

This HDMI USB-C adapter is specifically designed for devices where the USB Type-C port supports video output or DP Alt Mode, facilitating effortless mirroring or extension of your USB-C laptop's display to an HDMI/VGA TV, projector, or monitor.

The adapter supports simultaneous operation of both HDMI and VGA ports. The HDMI port offers a maximum resolution of 4K UHD (4096x2160@30Hz) with backward compatibility to 1080p and 720p. When both HDMI and VGA are active, the maximum resolution for each display is 1920x1080P@60Hz, and both monitors will mirror the same content.

The adapter supports both extend and mirror modes, enhancing work efficiency by allowing you to extend your desktop to two external displays.

**Travel-Friendly Design:**

The lightweight and portable nature of this USB-C to HDMI/VGA multiport adapter makes it an excellent companion for travel and presentations.

**Compatible Devices Include:**

*   MacBook/MacBook Pro (2019/2018/2017/2016), Macbook Air 2018, Mac mini 2018, iPad Pro 2018

This compact and discreet SUPEREYE digital voice recorder is designed for effortless, high-quality audio capture, making it an indispensable tool for lectures, meetings, interviews, and personal notes. Its user-friendly interface and advanced features ensure you never miss a crucial word.

This straightforward operation makes it accessible for everyone, including beginners and seniors. Files are automatically organized by date and time for efficient retrieval.

*   **Intelligent Voice Activation (AVR):** Activate the AVR function in settings to enable automatic recording. The device intelligently detects sound, initiating recording only when an audible presence is detected and pausing during silence. This conserves storage space and eliminates extraneous noise.

*   **Superior Audio Quality with Noise Reduction:** Equipped with dual stereo microphones, the recorder delivers full, detailed stereo sound and clear, long-distance recording. Leveraging PCM lossless professional recording technology and a dedicated noise reduction chip, it intelligently enhances voice clarity and filters out background distractions, ensuring 360° stereo HD recording.

*   **Versatile Functionality & Comprehensive Support:** Beyond its core recording capabilities, the device offers Music playback, Folder management, and Settings. It's ideal for capturing ideas, memos, lectures, meetings, and interviews. The SUPEREYE Digital Voice Recorder is engineered to meticulously capture every spoken word and significant moment.

*   **Real-Time Monitoring:** Insert headphones during recording to monitor audio quality in real-time, allowing for immediate adjustments to ensure optimal results.

*   **Multi-Functional Use:** Enjoy a range of features including MP3 music playback, A-B repeat for focused study, one-touch recording, auto-record, and variable speed playback. **CTYBB Qi Wireless Car Charger Mount: Effortless Charging and Secure Mounting**

The CTYBB Qi Auto-Clamping Air Vent Dashboard Car Phone Holder, integrated with a QC3.0 car charger, offers a seamless solution for keeping your devices powered and accessible while on the go. This versatile mount is compatible with a wide range of Qi-enabled smartphones, including popular models like the Galaxy S20/S10+ and iPhone 12/12 Pro/11 series.

**Intelligent Fast Charging Capabilities**

"The CTYBB Car Wireless Charger Mount is Qi-certified, ensuring reliable and efficient power delivery," states the product documentation. At its core lies a responsive smart chip designed to intelligently identify wireless fast-charging devices and optimize charging power. To facilitate rapid charging, the mount is bundled with a QC3.0 fast car charger port. This ensures that compatible devices receive the optimal wattage, whether it's 5W, 7.5W, or 10W, for swift power replenishment.

**One-Button Auto-Clamping for Ultimate Convenience**

Experience true one-handed operation with the CTYBB Qi Wireless Charger for Car. An advanced built-in sensor activates the auto-clamping mechanism the moment you place your phone into the holder, initiating the charging process. Releasing your device is equally effortless; a simple touch of the buttons on the mount's sides disengages the clamps without requiring you to unplug anything. Notably, the mount retains its one-button release functionality for up to five minutes after the car is turned off, providing continued convenience.

**Charging Through Phone Cases**

"Yes, the CTYBB Wireless Car Phone Holder Mount is designed to work with most phone cases," the product details confirm. For optimal charging performance, it is recommended to use cases with a thickness of 0.16 inches or less and to avoid metal attachments. The clamp can expand up to 0.48 inches, accommodating Qi-enabled devices ranging from 4.0 to 6.5 inches in screen size. However, it's important to note that this mount is not compatible with mobile phones measuring 6.7 inches and above, such as the iPhone 12 Pro Max or Samsung S21 Ultra.

**360° Adjustable Mount for Optimal Viewing**

The CTYBB phone holder offers flexible mounting options, allowing you to choose between an air vent or dashboard attachment. It features an adjustable, extendable arm equipped with a strong, washable, and reusable suction cup. A 360° ball joint provides complete flexibility, enabling you to position your phone at the ideal angle for safe driving, whether for hands-free calls or GPS navigation.

**What's Included:**

Your purchase includes one Wireless Car Charger Mount, one QC3.0 car charger, one Dashboard Mount and Air Vent Clip, and one USB Type-C cable. CTYBB also backs this product with an 18-month warranty for any quality-related issues.

## 15W Q Fast Wireless Car Charger Pad & Mount

This innovative 2-in-1 car wireless charger seamlessly blends the convenience of a portable car phone mount with cutting-edge wireless charging technology. Simply place your Qi-enabled smartphone on the silicone charging pad for effortless power-ups. Beyond charging, it functions as a secure phone mount, perfect for navigation, and is designed to work with most mobile phone cases without compromising charging efficiency.

**Broad Compatibility & Safety Features:**

This versatile wireless car charger holder supports all Qi-enabled devices, including:

*   **Apple:** iPhone 12/12 Pro/12 Pro Max/12 Mini, iPhone 11/11 Pro/11 Pro Max, iPhone 8/8 Plus, iPhone X/XS/XR.
*   **Samsung:** Galaxy S10/S10+/S10e, S9 Plus/S9, S8 Plus/S8, S7/S7 Edge; Note 9/8/7.
*   **Other Devices:** LG V30/V40/G7, Huawei Mate 20 Pro, and other Qi-compatible Android phones.

It offers flexible output power options: 5W, 7.5W, and 10W. Advanced safety features, including overvoltage protection, temperature control, overcurrent protection, and short-circuit protection, ensure a safe and rapid charging experience.

**Designed for Your Vehicle:**

The anti-slip universal dash mount is engineered for a variety of car dashboards, including sedans, trucks, and SUVs with flat surfaces. Its universal sticky silicone pad features a large, secure base that firmly grips your phone, preventing drops even on deceleration zones or bumpy roads, ensuring an uninterrupted charging experience.

**Premium Silicone Construction:**

Crafted from high-quality silicone, this car wireless charger mount offers a comfortable feel. It is both soft and strong, allowing your phone to be easily and securely held. The material is washable, reusable, recyclable, and heat-resistant. Its black color is designed to minimize glare from sunlight, providing a better viewing experience.

**Versatile for Any Setting:**

Beyond the car, this wireless charging mat is suitable for use at home, in the office, meeting rooms, department stores, schools, and showrooms. Its simple, portable design makes it easy to move and use wherever you need it. It also makes for a thoughtful Father's Day gift.

Description:

**Experience Seamless Charging with the POLMXS C3 Wireless Car Charger**

This advanced wireless charging pad, the POLMXS C3, is designed to provide a convenient and efficient charging solution for your smartphone while you're on the go. Adhering to the **international Qi standard**, this charger has undergone rigorous quality control and passed **CE, FCC, and RoHS certifications**, ensuring both performance and safety. Whether you're navigating city streets or embarking on a long road trip, the POLMXS C3 offers a reliable way to keep your device powered.

**Key Features:**

*   **Certified Qi Standard and Fast Charging:** The POLMXS C3 is compliant with the **international Qi wireless charging standard**, boasting **CE, FCC, and RoHS certifications**. It supports **10W fast wireless charging** and also offers **7.5W charging**, making it an excellent wireless car charger. It's equally useful as a wireless charger at your office or home. As one satisfied customer noted, "The convenience of just placing my phone on the pad while driving is a game-changer."

*   **Rapid Charging Capabilities:** Utilizing **10W and 7.5W fast wireless charging technology**, this pad significantly speeds up the charging process for compatible devices. When a phone supporting fast wireless charging is placed on the pad, it automatically engages fast charge mode. For devices that do not support fast wireless charging, the POLMXS C3 will charge them at a standard **5W mode**.

*   **Driving Convenience and Safety:** Designed with drivers in mind, the POLMXS C3 allows you to simply place your phone on the charging pad to begin charging. Answering calls is as easy as picking up your phone. The charger is constructed with **non-slip silicone**, ensuring your phone remains securely in place, preventing slips and drops during wireless charging.

*   **Qi-Enabled Devices Only:** This wireless charger is exclusively compatible with **Qi-enabled devices**. For phones that do not have built-in wireless charging capabilities, you will need to use a separate **wireless phone charger receiver card**. If you are unsure about your phone's compatibility, please contact us for assistance. We recommend using a high-quality receiver card, as a subpar one may affect charging performance.

*   **Two-Year Warranty and Dedicated Support:** POLMXS stands behind its products with a **two-year warranty** on this wireless charger. You can have peace of mind knowing your investment is protected. Should you encounter any issues with the car wireless charger, such as it not working with your phone or not performing optimally, please reach out to us. We are committed to providing a satisfactory resolution, and our return policy is readily available.

**ICEFANG Silent Lightweight Tactical Dog Harness with Handle**

This ICEFANG tactical dog harness, designed for working dogs and training, offers a silent, lightweight, and no-pull solution. Available in brown, the Medium size fits chests from 25" to 31".

**Key Features:**

*   **Sizing & Care:** Consult the ICEFANG size chart for the best fit. Medium: Neck 16"-22", Chest 25"-31". Large: Neck 18"-24", Chest 28"-35". X-Large: Neck 20"-28", Chest 32"-39". This harness is not for tie-out use. Secure strap ends by burning and solidifying to prevent fraying. Hand-wash with detergent and air dry.

*   **Easy On/Off:** This overhead harness slides easily over your dog's head. Ensure it fits comfortably, avoiding neck constriction or armpit/foreleg rubbing, before securing the quick-release belly buckle.

*   **Dual Leash Clips:** The front clip redirects pulling, lifting the dog's legs off the ground for controlled walks and training. The rear clip is for well-trained dogs. The durable, oversized handle allows for quick grabs in crowds and assists with lifting your dog into vehicles.

*   **MOLLE/PALS System:** Two 1" MOLLE strips on each side (Medium: 4xHook & 2xLoop) allow your dog to carry gear. Compatible with MOLLE/PALS pouches, or attach items like water bottles and toys via a D-ring carabiner (not included).

*   **Dog Identification:** Hook and loop panels are integrated for attaching ID patches. Three 1" hook and loop strips are on the sides (Medium: 3"x6"). A loop panel runs along the back (Medium: 3" wide), and a square loop panel is on the front chest (Medium: 2"x3").

**Materials & Construction:**

Crafted from 1050D Nylon with a PU water-resistant coating, this harness features soft, padded, ventilated mesh lining, alloy metal hardware, and 100% nylon webbing and thread. Bartack and X-in-box stitching at all load-bearing points ensures durability and prevents breakage.

The harness is constructed from two individual components, offering four adjustable positions (shoulder, chest) for a precise, comfortable, escape-proof fit that prevents rubbing.

**RGGD&RGGL Yoga Ball Chair: Enhance Your Core and Comfort**

The RGGD&RGGL Yoga Ball Chair, designed for any fitness level, offers a robust and versatile solution for both exercise and everyday seating. Constructed from heavy-weight vinyl, this Swiss ball is approximately 1.5 times thicker than standard options, providing enhanced stability and rigidity. Its burst-resistant feature ensures user safety, with the ball designed to deflate slowly if punctured, preventing injury. The RGGD&RGGL ball can withstand up to 2100 pounds of pressure.

**Versatile Fitness and Seating Solution**

This exercise ball chair is perfect for developing core strength and improving posture. It comes with two adjustable resistance bands, allowing for a full-body workout that targets poses like back bends and hip openers. Whether you're a beginner, intermediate, or advanced athlete, the RGGD&RGGL ball can be incorporated into your fitness routine.

Beyond exercise, the RGGD&RGGL Birthing ball serves as an excellent alternative to traditional office chairs. Its inherent instability encourages abdominal muscles to engage more actively, combating the discomfort and fatigue associated with prolonged sitting. This makes it an ideal choice for office environments, home gyms, and even during pregnancy, where it can alleviate pressure on the spine, hips, and lower back.

**Premium Design and Easy Maintenance**

Crafted from premium PVC material, the RGGD&RGGL yoga ball chair offers excellent slip resistance, ensuring stability during various movements. Its innovative design helps maintain posture, even when changing positions. Cleaning is straightforward, requiring only mild soap and water or the included cleaning cloth.

**Comprehensive Package**

The RGGD&RGGL Yoga Ball Chair package includes:
*   1 Office ball chair
*   1 Stability ring
*   1 Set of accessories
*   2 Resistance bands with carabiners
*   1 Quick inflation foot pump
*   1 Set of plugs and stoppers
*   1 Workout guide
*   1 User manual

The fitness ball ships deflated and includes a foot pump for easy inflation. The accompanying workout guide and user manual provide clear instructions for proper use and achieving your fitness goals.

**Quality and Safety Assured**

The RGGD&RGGL factory is BSCI certified, and the product has passed all GS safety standards. The non-toxic PVC construction is environmentally friendly, free from BPA and phthalates. This anti-burst design ensures the ball's resilience and safety.

"We insist on the highest-quality non-toxic PVC construction for your safety and peace of mind," states a company representative. "This anti-burst construction gives our stability ball the resilience to support up to 2,200 lbs of weight without leaking and without becoming misshapen."

Experience unparalleled low-light recording with the camcorder's infrared night vision. Beyond its recording prowess, this device functions as a webcam for platforms like YouTube and Skype. **Feature-Rich Multifunctionality**

This camcorder is packed with features to enhance your creative workflow. It supports Time-lapse, Slow-motion video, Motion Detection, Self-shooting, Continuous shooting, and Playback Modes. **Aasonida FHD 1080P Camcorder: Your Gateway to High-Quality Vlogging**

The Aasonida Digital Vlogging Camera is engineered to empower aspiring content creators, offering a robust feature set for capturing life's moments in stunning clarity. This camcorder, designed for YouTube and general vlogging, boasts an upgraded chip for exceptional 1080P/30fps video and 24MP photos. Its advanced high-sensitivity CMOS sensor ensures clear, steady imagery, even in challenging low-light conditions.

**Enhanced Audio and Versatile Functionality**

A standout feature is the included external stereo microphone, which significantly enhances audio quality by reducing noise and delivering precise stereo sound. This makes the Aasonida camera ideal for recording lectures, speeches, and conferences. Beyond its core video capabilities, the camcorder offers a 3-inch 270-degree rotatable screen, built-in fill light, anti-shake technology, face detection, beauty face enhancement, smile capture, and a self-timer. It also functions as a webcam, supports pause recording, and features an auto power-off function.

**Seamless Connectivity and User-Friendly Design**

The Aasonida camcorder excels in connectivity, serving as a high-quality webcam for streaming on platforms like Facebook, Twitch, and YouTube, as well as for everyday video calls. Its TV output allows for direct playback of recorded videos on a television in high definition. Furthermore, a USB connection enables easy uploading, editing, and sharing of content to a computer. The intuitive pause function allows users to halt and resume recording without creating new files, while the 3-inch flip screen and self-timer facilitate effortless selfies from any angle.

**Extended Recording and Reliable Support**

Designed for portability, this lightweight camcorder comes with two rechargeable batteries, supporting continuous recording even while charging. This ensures you never miss a precious moment. Aasonida stands behind its product with a 30-day money-back guarantee, a 12-month warranty, and dedicated after-sales support.

**Key Specifications:**

*   **Image Resolution:** Up to 24MP
*   **Video Resolution:** FHD 1920x1080P (30fps)
*   **Display:** 3.0-inch TFT LCD (16:9), 270-degree rotation
*   **Memory Card:** Supports external SD/MMC cards (4GB to 32GB, not included)
*   **Power:** Rechargeable lithium battery (Model: NP-FV5)
*   **Connectivity:** Mini USB 2.0, TV Output (NTSC/PAL)
*   **Operating Systems:** Windows XP/Vista/7/8/10, Mac 10.2

**Important Considerations:**

This camcorder is designed for amateur use. For optimal clarity, maintain a shooting distance of at least 4ft (1.5m). It is recommended to format the SD card within the camcorder before first use.

**Package Includes:**

FHD Camcorder, Remote Control, External Microphone, 2 Rechargeable Batteries, Charging Adapter, USB Cable, TV Cable, Storage Bag, and User Manual.
